drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally available Raf kinase inhibitor with potential antineoplastic activity. Encorafenib specifically inhibits Raf kinase, a serine/threonine enzyme in the RAF/mitogen-activated protein kinase kinase (MEK)/extracellular signal-related kinase (ERK) signaling pathway. By inhibiting the activation of the RAF/MEK/ERK signaling pathway, the administration of LGX818 may result in a decrease in proliferation of tumor cells. The Raf mutation BRAF V600E is frequently upregulated in a variety of human tumors and results in the constitutive activation of the RAF/MEK/ERK signaling pathway that regulates cellular proliferation and survival.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: Panitumumab与正常和肿瘤细胞上的EGFR特异性结合，并竞争性抑制EGFR配体的结合。 非临床研究表明，Panitumumab与EGFR结合可阻止配体诱导的受体自磷酸化和受体相关激酶的激活，从而抑制细胞生长，诱导凋亡，减少促炎细胞因子和血管生长因子的产生以及EGFR的内化。 体外测定和体内动物研究表明，Panitumumab可以抑制表达EGFR的某些人类肿瘤细胞系的生长和存活。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A human monoclonal antibody produced in transgenic mice that attaches to the transmembrane epidermal growth factor (EGF) receptor. Panitumumab may inhibit autocrine EGF stimulation of tumor cells that express the EGF receptor, thereby inhibiting tumor cell proliferation.

A methylated derivative and structural analog of PRIMA-1 (p53 re-activation and induction of massive apoptosis), with potential antineoplastic activity. Upon administration, PRIMA-1 analog APR-246 covalently modifies the core domain of mutated forms of cellular tumor antigen p53 (p53) through the alkylation of thiol groups. These modifications restore both the wild-type conformation and function to mutant p53, which reconstitutes endogenous p53 activity, leading to cell cycle arrest and apoptosis in tumor cells. This agent may work synergistically with other antineoplastic agents. p53, a tumor suppressor and transcription factor normally activated upon DNA damage, is frequently mutated and overexpressed in cancer cells; it plays a key role in both DNA repair and the induction of apoptosis.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 阿扎胞苷为胞苷的嘧啶核苷类似物，具有抗肿瘤活性。 阿扎胞苷被掺入 DNA 中，它可逆地抑制 DNA 甲基转移酶，从而阻断 DNA 甲基化。 阿扎胞苷对 DNA 的低甲基化可能会激活因高甲基化而沉默的肿瘤抑制基因，从而产生抗肿瘤作用。 该试剂还掺入 RNA，从而破坏正常的 RNA 功能并削弱 tRNA 胞嘧啶-5-甲基转移酶活性。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A pyrimidine nucleoside analogue of cytidine with antineoplastic activity. Azacitidine is incorporated into DNA, where it reversibly inhibits DNA methyltransferase, thereby blocking DNA methylation.  Hypomethylation of DNA by azacitidine may activate tumor suppressor genes silenced by hypermethylation, resulting in an antitumor effect. This agent is also incorporated into RNA, thereby disrupting normal RNA function and impairing tRNA cytosine-5-methyltransferase activity. (NCI04)

An orally bioavailable allosteric inhibitor of the serine/threonine protein kinase Akt (protein kinase B) with potential antineoplastic activity. Akt inhibitor MK2206 binds to and inhibits the activity of Akt in a non-ATP competitive manner, which may result in the inhibition of the PI3K/Akt signaling pathway and tumor cell proliferation and the induction of tumor cell apoptosis. Activation of the PI3K/Akt signaling pathway is frequently associated with tumorigenesis and dysregulated PI3K/Akt signaling may contribute to tumor resistance to a variety of antineoplastic agents.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: Capivasertib是一种新型的吡咯嘧啶衍生物，一种可口服的丝氨酸/苏氨酸蛋白激酶AKT(蛋白激酶B)抑制剂，具有潜在的抗肿瘤活性。Capivasertib结合并抑制所有AKT亚型。抑制AKT可阻止介导细胞过程(如细胞分裂、细胞凋亡、葡萄糖和脂肪酸代谢)的AKT底物磷酸化。广泛的实体和血液恶性肿瘤显示PI3K/AKT/mTOR信号因多种信号成分突变而失调。通过靶向PIK3/AKT信号网络中的关键节点AKT，该药物可用于多种人类癌症的单药或联合治疗。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A novel pyrrolopyrimidine derivative, and an orally available inhibitor of the serine/threonine protein kinase AKT (protein kinase B) with potential antineoplastic activity. Capivasertib binds to and inhibits all AKT isoforms. Inhibition of AKT prevents the phosphorylation of AKT substrates that mediate cellular processes, such as cell division, apoptosis, and glucose and fatty acid metabolism. A wide range of solid and hematological malignancies show dysregulated PI3K/AKT/mTOR signaling due to mutations in multiple signaling components. By targeting AKT, the key node in the PIK3/AKT signaling network, this agent may be used as monotherapy or combination therapy for a variety of human cancers.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 紫杉醇是一种抗微管类的化疗药物。 紫杉醇常用于多种癌症治疗中，它是一种有丝分裂抑制剂，是于 1971 年从太平洋紫杉树的树皮中首次分离出来，并于1993年批准用于医学用途，并被列于世界卫生组织的基本药物清单。 紫杉醇的作用机理主要是去影响微管的正常功能，透过稳定与GDP结合的微管蛋白，从而致使快速分裂的肿瘤细胞在有丝分裂阶段被限制而无法分离，将细胞阻断于细胞周期之G2与M期间，使癌细胞复制受阻断而死亡。因此紫杉醇在抗癌药物当中，被视为有丝分裂中的微管抑制剂。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: Paclitaxel is a chemotherapeutic agent marketed under the brand name Taxol among others. Used as a treatment for various cancers, paclitaxel is a mitotic inhibitor that was first isolated in 1971 from the bark of the Pacific yew tree which contains endophytic fungi that synthesize paclitaxel. It is available as an intravenous solution for injection and the newer formulation contains albumin-bound paclitaxel marketed under the brand name Abraxane.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 康奈非尼是一种激酶抑制剂，在体外无细胞试验中可靶向BRAF V600E以及野生型BRAF和CRAF，IC50值分别为0.35、0.47和0.3nM。BRAF基因中的突变(例如BRAF V600E)可导致组成性激活BRAF激酶，从而刺激肿瘤细胞生长。康奈非尼还能够在体外与其他激酶（包括JNK1、JNK2、JNK3、LIMK1、LIMK2、MEK4和STK36）结合，并在临床可达浓度（≤0.9µM）下减少配体与这些激酶的结合。康奈非尼可在体外抑制BRAF V600E、V600D和V600K突变型肿瘤细胞株的生长。在BRAF V600E突变型肿瘤细胞异种移植小鼠模型中，康奈非尼可诱导与RAF/MEK/ERK通路抑制相关的肿瘤消退。康奈非尼和比美替尼（Binimetinib）靶向RAS/RAF/MEK/ERK通路中的两种不同激酶。与单独使用两种药物相比，康奈非尼联用比美替尼在体外对BRAF突变阳性细胞系具有更强的抗增殖活性，并且在小鼠的BRAF V600E突变型人源黑素瘤异种移植模型中表现出更强的抗肿瘤活性。另外，与单独使用任一药物相比，康奈非尼与比美替尼的联用延迟了BRAF V600E突变型人源黑素瘤异种移植小鼠中耐药性的出现。目前已确定，BRAF突变型结直肠癌中EGFR介导的MAPK途径的诱导激活是其对BRAF抑制剂产生耐药性的机制。 在非临床模型中，BRAF抑制剂和EGFR靶向药物的联用组合已被证明可以克服这种耐药机制。 在携带BRAF V600E突变的结直肠癌小鼠模型中，康奈非尼和西妥昔单抗联用被证实具有比单独使用任何一种药物都要强的抗肿瘤作用。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally available Raf kinase inhibitor with potential antineoplastic activity. Encorafenib specifically inhibits Raf kinase, a serine/threonine enzyme in the RAF/mitogen-activated protein kinase kinase (MEK)/extracellular signal-related kinase (ERK) signaling pathway. By inhibiting the activation of the RAF/MEK/ERK signaling pathway, the administration of LGX818 may result in a decrease in proliferation of tumor cells. The Raf mutation BRAF V600E is frequently upregulated in a variety of human tumors and results in the constitutive activation of the RAF/MEK/ERK signaling pathway that regulates cellular proliferation and survival.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn:
Binimetinib是一种有丝分裂原激活的细胞外信号调节激酶1（MEK1）和MEK2活性的可逆抑制剂。 MEK蛋白是细胞外信号相关激酶（ERK）途径的上游调节剂。在体外，binimetinib在无细胞试验中抑制了细胞外信号相关激酶（ERK）的磷酸化，并抑制了BRAF突变型人黑素瘤细胞系的活力和MEK依赖性磷酸化。 Binimetinib在BRAF突变鼠异种移植模型中也抑制体内ERK磷酸化和肿瘤生长。
Binimetinib和encorafenib靶向RAS / RAF / MEK / ERK途径中的两个不同的激酶。与单独使用任何一种药物相比，encorafenib和Binimetinib的共同给药在体外对BRAF突变阳性细胞系具有更大的抗增殖活性，并且在小鼠的BRAF V600E突变型人黑素瘤异种移植研究中对肿瘤生长抑制具有更大的抗肿瘤活性。另外，比binimetinib和encorafenib的组合与单独使用任何一种药物相比，都延迟了小鼠BRAF V600E突变型人黑素瘤异种移植物中抗药性的出现。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally available inhibitor of mitogen-activated protein kinase kinase 1 and 2 (MEK1/2) with potential antineoplastic activity. Binimetinib, noncompetitive with ATP, binds to and inhibits the activity of MEK1/2. Inhibition of MEK1/2 prevents the activation of MEK1/2 dependent effector proteins and transcription factors, which may result in the inhibition of growth factor-mediated cell signaling. This may eventually lead to an inhibition of tumor cell proliferation and an inhibition in production of various inflammatory cytokines including interleukin-1, -6 and tumor necrosis factor. MEK1/2 are dual-specificity threonine/tyrosine kinases that play key roles in the activation of the RAS/RAF/MEK/ERK pathway and are often upregulated in a variety of tumor cell types.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 表皮生长因子受体（EGFR，HER1，c-ErbB-1）是跨膜糖蛋白，是I型受体酪氨酸激酶（包括EGFR，HER2，HER3和HER4）亚族成员之一。 EGFR在包括皮肤和毛囊在内的许多正常上皮组织中组成性表达。EGFR的表达在多种人类癌症（包括头颈部癌、结肠和直肠癌）中同样被检出。西妥昔单抗与正常和肿瘤细胞上的EGFR特异性结合，并竞争性抑制表皮生长因子（EGF）和其他配体（如转化生长因子-α）的结合。体外试验和体内动物研究表明，西妥昔单抗与EGFR的结合可阻断受体相关激酶的磷酸化和激活，从而抑制细胞生长，诱导细胞凋亡，并降低基质金属蛋白酶和血管内皮生长因子的产生。EGFR信号转导可导致野生型Ras蛋白的激活，但是在具有激活性Ras体细胞突变的细胞中，突变Ras蛋白都表现出持续的活性，不受EGFR调控状态的影响。在体外，西妥昔单抗可调节针对部分类型人类肿瘤的抗体依赖性细胞毒性（ADCC）。体外试验和体内动物研究表明，西妥昔单抗可抑制EGFR表达肿瘤细胞的生长和存活。在缺乏EGFR表达的人源肿瘤异种移植体中未观察到西妥昔单抗的抗肿瘤作用。在人源肿瘤异种移植小鼠模型中，西妥昔单抗加放疗或西妥昔单抗加伊立替康的抗肿瘤效果强于单独的放疗或化疗。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A recombinant, chimeric monoclonal antibody directed against the epidermal growth factor (EGFR) with antineoplastic activity. Cetuximab binds to the extracellular domain of the EGFR, thereby preventing the activation and subsequent dimerization of the receptor; the decrease in receptor activation and dimerization may result in an inhibition in signal transduction and anti-proliferative effects. This agent may inhibit EGFR-dependent primary tumor growth and metastasis. EGFR is overexpressed on the cell surfaces of various solid tumors.

therapeutic_regimen.regimen_cn: 康奈非尼+比美替尼+西妥昔单抗

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 依维莫司是PI3K / AKT通路下游的雷帕霉素（sTOR-s苏氨酸激酶）哺乳动物靶标的抑制剂。该mTOR通路在几种人类癌症和结节性硬化复合物（TSC）中失调。细胞内蛋白FKBP-12，与mTOR复合物1（mTORC1）形成抑制性复合物，从而抑制mTOR激酶活性。依维莫司降低S6核糖体蛋白激酶（S6K1）和真核起始因子4E结合蛋白（4E -BP1），mTOR的下游效应子，参与蛋白质合成，S6K1是mTORC1的底物，磷酸化雌激素受体的激活结构域1，导致受体的配体非依赖性激活；依维莫司抑制缺氧的表达。诱导因子（例如HIF-1）并降低血管内皮生长因子（VEGF）的表达，依维莫司对mTOR的抑制作用可降低细胞增殖体外和/或体内研究中的血管生成，血管生成和葡萄糖摄取。 PI3K / Akt / mTOR途径的组成性激活可以促进乳腺癌的内分泌抵抗力。体外研究表明，雌激素依赖性和HER2 +乳腺癌细胞对依维莫司的抑制作用敏感，并且依维莫司和Akt，HER2或芳香酶抑制剂的联合治疗以协同方式增强了依维莫司的抗肿瘤活性.2 mTORC1信号的调节剂是癌基因抑制物结核菌硬化复合物1和2（TSC1，TSC2）。 TSC1或TSC2的丢失或失活导致下游信号传导的激活。在TSC中，一种遗传性疾病会导致TSC1或TSC2基因的失活突变导致错构瘤在全身的形成以及癫痫发作和癫痫发生。 mTOR的过度激活会导致神经元发育异常，轴突发生异常和树突形成，兴奋性突触电流增加，髓鞘减少以及皮质层状结构破坏。导致神经元发育和功能异常。在大脑中mTOR失调的动物模型中用mTOR抑制剂治疗可抑制癫痫发作，预防新发癫痫发作的发生并防止过早死亡。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A derivative of the natural macrocyclic lactone sirolimus with immunosuppressant and anti-angiogenic properties. In cells, everolimus binds to the immunophilin FK Binding Protein-12 (FKBP-12) to generate an immunosuppressive complex that binds to and inhibits the activation of the mammalian Target of Rapamycin (mTOR), a key regulatory kinase. Inhibition of mTOR activation results in the inhibition of T lymphocyte activation and proliferation associated with antigen and cytokine (IL-2, IL-4, and IL-15) stimulation and the inhibition of antibody production. (NCI05)

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 贝伐珠单抗结合VEGF并阻止VEGF与其在内皮细胞表面的受体（Flt-1和KDR）相互作用。 在血管生成的体外模型中，VEGF与其受体的相互作用导致内皮细胞增殖和新血管形成。 在裸鼠结肠癌异种移植模型中应用贝伐珠单抗可降低微血管生长和抑制转移性疾病的进展。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A recombinant humanized monoclonal antibody directed against the vascular endothelial growth factor (VEGF), a pro-angiogenic cytokine.  Bevacizumab binds to VEGF and inhibits VEGF receptor binding, thereby preventing the growth and maintenance of tumor blood vessels.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 达拉非尼是部分突变型BRAF激酶的抑制剂，其对BRAF V600E、BRAF V600K和BRAF V600D突变型激酶的体外IC50值分别为0.65、0.5和1.84 nM。达拉非尼还抑制野生型BRAF和CRAF激酶，IC50值分别为3.2和5.0 nM，并且在更高浓度下可抑制其他激酶（如SIK1，NEK11和LIMK1）。 BRAF基因中的某些突变（包括BRAF V600E突变），可能会导致BRAF激酶组成性激活，从而刺激肿瘤细胞的生长。 达拉非尼在体外和体内均可抑制多种BRAF V600突变阳性肿瘤细胞的生长。达拉非尼联用曲美替尼可靶向RAS / RAF / MEK / ERK通路中的两种激酶。 与单独使用这两种药物相比，达拉非尼联用曲美替尼对BRAF V600突变阳性肿瘤细胞系生长的体外抑制效果更强，并且对BRAF V600突变阳性肿瘤异种移植瘤生长的抑制作用也更持久。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable inhibitor of B-raf (BRAF) protein with potential antineoplastic activity. Dabrafenib selectively binds to and inhibits the activity of B-raf, which may inhibit the proliferation of tumor cells which contain a mutated BRAF gene. B-raf belongs to the raf/mil family of serine/threonine protein kinases and plays a role in regulating the MAP kinase/ERKs signaling pathway, which may be constitutively activated due to BRAF gene mutations.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 拉帕替尼是表皮生长因子受体（EGFR [ErbB1]）和人类表皮受体2型（HER2 [ErbB2]）受体的细胞内酪氨酸激酶结构域的4-苯胺基喹唑啉激酶抑制剂（估计K i app值为3nM和13nM）分别具有大于或等于300分钟的解离半衰期。拉帕替尼可在体外和各种动物模型中抑制ErbB驱动的肿瘤细胞生长。当将拉帕替尼和5-FU（卡培他滨的活性代谢物）组合用于4种测试的肿瘤细胞系时，在体外研究中证明了加和作用。在曲妥珠单抗调节的细胞系中评估了拉帕替尼的生长抑制作用。拉帕替尼对选择在含有曲妥珠单抗的培养基中长期生长的乳腺癌细胞株具有显着的活性。这些体外发现表明这两种药物之间没有交叉耐药性。共表达HER2的激素受体阳性乳腺癌细胞（带有ER [Estrogen Receptor]和/或PgR [Progesterone Receptor]）倾向于对已建立的内分泌疗法产生抗药性。同样，当肿瘤对内分泌治疗产生抗药性时，最初缺乏EGFR或HER2的激素受体阳性乳腺癌细胞会上调这些受体蛋白。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A synthetic, orally-active quinazoline with potential antineoplastic properties. Lapatinib reversibly blocks phosphorylation of the epidermal growth factor receptor (EGFR), ErbB2, and the Erk-1 and-2 and AKT kinases; it also inhibits cyclin D protein levels in human tumor cell lines and xenografts. EGFR and ErbB2 have been implicated in the growth of various tumor types.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 司美替尼是一种MEK1/2抑制剂，MEK1/2是ERK信号通路的上游调节因子。MEK和ERK都是RAS调节的RAF-MEK-ERK通路中的重要组分，该通路再多种肿瘤中均有发现突变。在小鼠移植瘤模型中，口服司美替尼可抑制NF1引发的神经纤维瘤的生长。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally active, small molecule with potential antineoplastic activity. Selumetinib is an ATP-independent inhibitor of mitogen-activated protein kinase kinase (MEK or MAPK/ERK kinase) 1 and 2. MEK 1 and 2 are dual specificity kinases that are essential mediators in the activation of the RAS/RAF/MEK/ERK pathway, are often upregulated in various cancer cells, and are drivers of diverse cellular responses, including proliferation. Inhibition of both MEK1 and 2 by selumetinib prevents the activation of MEK1/2 dependent effector proteins and transcription factors, thereby leading to an inhibition of cellular proliferation in various cancers.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 拉帕替尼是表皮生长因子受体（EGFR [ErbB1]）和人类表皮受体2型（HER2 [ErbB2]）受体的细胞内酪氨酸激酶结构域的4-苯胺基喹唑啉激酶抑制剂（估计K i app值为3nM和13nM）分别具有大于或等于300分钟的解离半衰期。拉帕替尼可在体外和各种动物模型中抑制ErbB驱动的肿瘤细胞生长。当将拉帕替尼和5-FU（卡培他滨的活性代谢物）组合用于4种测试的肿瘤细胞系时，在体外研究中证明了加和作用。在曲妥珠单抗调节的细胞系中评估了拉帕替尼的生长抑制作用。拉帕替尼对选择在含有曲妥珠单抗的培养基中长期生长的乳腺癌细胞株具有显着的活性。这些体外发现表明这两种药物之间没有交叉耐药性。共表达HER2的激素受体阳性乳腺癌细胞（带有ER [Estrogen Receptor]和/或PgR [Progesterone Receptor]）倾向于对已建立的内分泌疗法产生抗药性。同样，当肿瘤对内分泌治疗产生抗药性时，最初缺乏EGFR或HER2的激素受体阳性乳腺癌细胞会上调这些受体蛋白。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A synthetic, orally-active quinazoline with potential antineoplastic properties. Lapatinib reversibly blocks phosphorylation of the epidermal growth factor receptor (EGFR), ErbB2, and the Erk-1 and-2 and AKT kinases; it also inhibits cyclin D protein levels in human tumor cell lines and xenografts. EGFR and ErbB2 have been implicated in the growth of various tumor types.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: Pazopanib（帕唑帕尼）是一种多酪氨酸激酶抑制剂，包括血管内皮生长因子受体（VEGFR）-1，VEGFR-2，VEGFR-3，血小板衍生生长因子受体（PDGFR）-α和-β，成纤维细胞生长因子受体（FGFR） -1和-3，细胞因子受体（Kit），白介素2受体诱导的T细胞激酶（Itk），淋巴细胞特异性蛋白酪氨酸激酶（Lck）和跨膜糖蛋白受体酪氨酸激酶（c-Fms）。 在体外，Pazopanib抑制配体诱导的VEGFR-2，Kit和PDGFR-β受体的自磷酸化。 在体内，Pazopanib抑制小鼠肺中VEGF诱导的VEGFR-2磷酸化，小鼠模型中的血管生成以及小鼠中某些人肿瘤异种移植物的生长。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A small molecule inhibitor of multiple protein tyrosine kinases with potential antineoplastic activity. Pazopanib selectively inhibits vascular endothelial growth factor receptors (VEGFR)-1, -2 and -3, c-kit and platelet derived growth factor receptor (PDGF-R), which may result in inhibition of angiogenesis in tumors in which these receptors are upregulated.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: Trametinib是有丝分裂原激活的胞外信号调节激酶1 (MEK1)和MEK2的激活以及MEK1和MEK2激酶活性的可逆抑制剂。MEK蛋白是细胞外信号相关激酶(ERK)通路的上游调节因子，可促进细胞增殖。BRAF V600E突变导致包括MEK1和MEK2在内的BRAF通路的结构性激活。Trametinib在体内外抑制多种BRAF V600突变阳性肿瘤细胞生长。Trametinib和dabrafenib针对RAS/RAF/MEK/ERK通路中的两种不同的激酶。与单独使用任一药物相比，联合使用trametinib和dabrafenib在体外对BRAF V600突变阳性肿瘤细胞系的生长抑制更强，并延长了对BRAF V600突变阳性肿瘤异种移植瘤生长的抑制时间。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable inhibitor of mitogen-activated protein kinase kinase (MEK MAPK/ERK kinase) with potential antineoplastic activity. Trametinib specifically binds to and inhibits MEK 1 and 2, resulting in an inhibition of growth factor-mediated cell signaling and cellular proliferation in various cancers. MEK 1 and 2, dual specificity threonine/tyrosine kinases often upregulated in various cancer cell types, play a key role in the activation of the RAS/RAF/MEK/ERK signaling pathway that regulates cell growth.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准AKEEGA（尼拉帕利和醋酸阿比特龙）双重作用片剂联合泼尼松用于治疗携带有害或疑似有害BRCA突变（BRCAm）转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌（mCRPC）的成年患者。

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: Niraparib（尼拉帕利）是聚（ADP-核糖）聚合酶（PARP）酶PARP-1和PARP-2的抑制剂，它们在DNA修复中起作用。 体外研究表明，Niraparib诱导的细胞毒性可能涉及抑制PARP酶活性和增加PARP-DNA复合物的形成，从而导致DNA损伤，细胞凋亡和细胞死亡。 在具有或不具有BRCA1 / 2缺陷的肿瘤细胞系中观察到了Niraparib诱导的细胞毒性增加。 在具有BRCA1 / 2缺陷的人类癌细胞系的小鼠异种移植模型中，以及在具有突变或野生型BRCA1 / 2的同源重组缺陷的人类患者源性异种移植肿瘤模型中，Niraparib降低了肿瘤的生长。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable inhibitor of poly (ADP-ribose) polymerase (PARP) types 1 and 2 (PARP-1 and -2), with antineoplastic activity. Upon administration, niraparib binds to and inhibits the activity of PARP-1 and -2, thereby inhibiting PARP-1 and -2-mediated DNA repair, enhancing the accumulation of DNA strand breaks, promoting genomic instability and resulting in apoptosis. The PARP family of proteins catalyzes post-translational ADP-ribosylation of nuclear proteins and is activated by single-strand DNA (ssDNA) breaks.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 阿比特龙是一种具有抗雄激素活性的口服醋酸酯甾体化合物，阿比特龙抑制类固醇17a-单加氧酶的酶活性，它是细胞色素p450家族的一员，催化参与睾酮合成的类固醇中间体的17a-羟基化。这种药剂可能会抑制睾丸和肾上腺产生睾酮，从而达到阉割范围水平。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally active acetate ester form of the steroidal compound abiraterone with antiandrogen activity. Abiraterone inhibits the enzymatic activity of steroid 17alpha-monooxygenase (17alpha-hydrolase/C17,20 lyase complex), a member of the cytochrome p450 family that catalyzes the 17alpha-hydroxylation of steroid intermediates involved in testosterone synthesis. Administration of this agent may suppress testosterone production by both the testes and the adrenals to castrate-range levels.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 泼尼松是一种具有抗炎和免疫调节作用的合成糖皮质激素。在细胞表面受体附着进入细胞后，泼尼松进入核内，与特定的核受体结合并激活，导致基因表达改变和抑制促炎性细胞因子的产生。该药物还能减少循环淋巴细胞的数量，诱导细胞分化，并刺激敏感肿瘤细胞群的凋亡。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A synthetic glucocorticoid with anti-inflammatory and immunomodulating properties.  After cell surface receptor attachment and cell entry, prednisone enters the nucleus where it binds to and activates specific nuclear receptors, resulting in an altered gene expression and inhibition of proinflammatory cytokine production.  This agent also decreases the number of circulating lymphocytes, induces cell differentiation, and stimulates apoptosis in sensitive tumor cell populations.

therapeutic_regimen.regimen_cn: 尼拉帕利+醋酸阿比特龙+泼尼松

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准康奈非尼联合比美替尼治疗BRAF V600E/K突变、无法手术切除或转移性黑色素瘤患者。
FDA批准康奈非尼联合比美替尼用于治疗BRAF V600E突变的转移性非小细胞肺癌(NSCLC)成人患者。

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 康奈非尼是一种激酶抑制剂，在体外无细胞试验中可靶向BRAF V600E以及野生型BRAF和CRAF，IC50值分别为0.35、0.47和0.3nM。BRAF基因中的突变(例如BRAF V600E)可导致组成性激活BRAF激酶，从而刺激肿瘤细胞生长。康奈非尼还能够在体外与其他激酶（包括JNK1、JNK2、JNK3、LIMK1、LIMK2、MEK4和STK36）结合，并在临床可达浓度（≤0.9µM）下减少配体与这些激酶的结合。康奈非尼可在体外抑制BRAF V600E、V600D和V600K突变型肿瘤细胞株的生长。在BRAF V600E突变型肿瘤细胞异种移植小鼠模型中，康奈非尼可诱导与RAF/MEK/ERK通路抑制相关的肿瘤消退。康奈非尼和比美替尼（Binimetinib）靶向RAS/RAF/MEK/ERK通路中的两种不同激酶。与单独使用两种药物相比，康奈非尼联用比美替尼在体外对BRAF突变阳性细胞系具有更强的抗增殖活性，并且在小鼠的BRAF V600E突变型人源黑素瘤异种移植模型中表现出更强的抗肿瘤活性。另外，与单独使用任一药物相比，康奈非尼与比美替尼的联用延迟了BRAF V600E突变型人源黑素瘤异种移植小鼠中耐药性的出现。目前已确定，BRAF突变型结直肠癌中EGFR介导的MAPK途径的诱导激活是其对BRAF抑制剂产生耐药性的机制。 在非临床模型中，BRAF抑制剂和EGFR靶向药物的联用组合已被证明可以克服这种耐药机制。 在携带BRAF V600E突变的结直肠癌小鼠模型中，康奈非尼和西妥昔单抗联用被证实具有比单独使用任何一种药物都要强的抗肿瘤作用。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally available Raf kinase inhibitor with potential antineoplastic activity. Encorafenib specifically inhibits Raf kinase, a serine/threonine enzyme in the RAF/mitogen-activated protein kinase kinase (MEK)/extracellular signal-related kinase (ERK) signaling pathway. By inhibiting the activation of the RAF/MEK/ERK signaling pathway, the administration of LGX818 may result in a decrease in proliferation of tumor cells. The Raf mutation BRAF V600E is frequently upregulated in a variety of human tumors and results in the constitutive activation of the RAF/MEK/ERK signaling pathway that regulates cellular proliferation and survival.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn:
Binimetinib是一种有丝分裂原激活的细胞外信号调节激酶1（MEK1）和MEK2活性的可逆抑制剂。 MEK蛋白是细胞外信号相关激酶（ERK）途径的上游调节剂。在体外，binimetinib在无细胞试验中抑制了细胞外信号相关激酶（ERK）的磷酸化，并抑制了BRAF突变型人黑素瘤细胞系的活力和MEK依赖性磷酸化。 Binimetinib在BRAF突变鼠异种移植模型中也抑制体内ERK磷酸化和肿瘤生长。
Binimetinib和encorafenib靶向RAS / RAF / MEK / ERK途径中的两个不同的激酶。与单独使用任何一种药物相比，encorafenib和Binimetinib的共同给药在体外对BRAF突变阳性细胞系具有更大的抗增殖活性，并且在小鼠的BRAF V600E突变型人黑素瘤异种移植研究中对肿瘤生长抑制具有更大的抗肿瘤活性。另外，比binimetinib和encorafenib的组合与单独使用任何一种药物相比，都延迟了小鼠BRAF V600E突变型人黑素瘤异种移植物中抗药性的出现。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally available inhibitor of mitogen-activated protein kinase kinase 1 and 2 (MEK1/2) with potential antineoplastic activity. Binimetinib, noncompetitive with ATP, binds to and inhibits the activity of MEK1/2. Inhibition of MEK1/2 prevents the activation of MEK1/2 dependent effector proteins and transcription factors, which may result in the inhibition of growth factor-mediated cell signaling. This may eventually lead to an inhibition of tumor cell proliferation and an inhibition in production of various inflammatory cytokines including interleukin-1, -6 and tumor necrosis factor. MEK1/2 are dual-specificity threonine/tyrosine kinases that play key roles in the activation of the RAS/RAF/MEK/ERK pathway and are often upregulated in a variety of tumor cell types.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准考比替尼与维莫非尼联合用于已扩散至身体其他部位或手术无法切除且具有BRAF V600E或V600K突变的晚期黑色素瘤患者的治疗。

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: Vemurafenib是一种低分子量的口服BRAF丝氨酸苏氨酸激酶突变抑制剂，包括BRAF V600E。Vemurafenib在体外也抑制其他激酶，如CRAF、ARAF、野生型BRAF、SRMS、ACK1、MAP4K5和FGR等。包括V600E在内的BRAF基因突变导致组成性激活的BRAF蛋白，在缺乏增殖所需的生长因子的情况下可导致细胞增殖。Vemurafenib在BRAF V600E突变的黑素瘤细胞和动物模型中具有抗肿瘤作用。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable, ATP-competitive, small-molecule inhibitor of BRAF(V600E) kinase with potential antineoplastic activity. Vemurafenib selectively binds to the ATP-binding site of BRAF(V600E) kinase and inhibits its activity, which may result in an inhibition of an over-activated MAPK signaling pathway downstream in BRAF(V600E) kinase-expressing tumor cells and a reduction in tumor cell proliferation. Approximately 90% of BRAF gene mutations involve a valine-to-glutamic acid mutation at residue 600 (V600E); the oncogene protein product, BRAF(V600E) kinase, exhibits a markedly elevated activity that over-activates the MAPK signaling pathway. The BRAF(V600E) gene mutation has been found to occur in approximately 60% of melanomas, and in about 8% of all solid tumors, including melanoma, colorectal, thyroid and other cancers.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 考比替尼是一种丝裂原活化蛋白激酶（MAPK）/胞外信号调节激酶-1（MEK1）和胞外信号调节激酶-2（MEK2）的可逆抑制剂。 MEK蛋白是胞外信号相关激酶（ERK）通路的上游调节因子，可促进细胞增殖。 BRAF V600E和V600K突变导致包括MEK1和MEK2在内的BRAF信号通路的组成性激活。 研究发现，考比替尼在BRAF V600E突变型肿瘤细胞移植小鼠中可移植肿瘤细胞的生长。 考比替尼和维莫非尼（vemurafenib）靶向RAS / RAF / MEK / ERK通路中的两个不同的激酶。 与单独使用任何一种药物相比，体外试验显示考比替尼联用维莫非尼可导致细胞凋亡增加，并在BRAF V600E突变型肿瘤细胞小鼠移植模型中减少肿瘤的生长。在小鼠肿瘤细胞移植模型中，考比替尼还阻止了维莫非尼介导的野生型BRAF肿瘤细胞株的生长。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable small-molecule inhibitor of mitogen-activated protein kinase kinase 1 (MAP2K1 or MEK1), with potential antineoplastic activity. Cobimetinib specifically binds to and inhibits the catalytic activity of MEK1, resulting in inhibition of extracellular signal-related kinase 2 (ERK2) phosphorylation and activation and decreased tumor cell proliferation. Preclinical studies have demonstrated that this agent is effective in inhibiting the growth of tumor cells bearing a B-RAF mutation, which has been found to be associated with many tumor types. A threonine-tyrosine kinase and a key component of the RAS/RAF/MEK/ERK signaling pathway that is frequently activated in human tumors, MEK1 is required for the transmission of growth-promoting signals from numerous receptor tyrosine kinases.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准阿替利珠单抗+考比替尼+维莫非尼用于治疗BRAF V600突变不可切除或转移性黑色素瘤患者。

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn:
PD-L1可以在肿瘤细胞和/或肿瘤浸润性免疫细胞上表达，并且可以在肿瘤微环境中有助于抑制抗肿瘤免疫反应。PD-L1与T细胞和抗原呈递细胞上的PD-1和B7.1受体结合，抑制细胞毒性T细胞活性、T细胞增殖和细胞因子的产生。
Atezolizumab是与PD-L1结合并阻断其与PD-1和B7.1受体相互作用的单克隆抗体。这释放了PD-L1 / PD-1介导的免疫反应抑制作用，包括抗肿瘤免疫反应的激活，而不会引起抗体依赖性细胞毒性。在同系小鼠肿瘤模型中，阻断PD-L1活性可导致肿瘤生长减少。
在癌症的小鼠模型中，与单独的靶向治疗相比，PD-1 / PD-L1和MAPK途径的双重抑制可通过增加抗原呈递，T细胞浸润和激活来抑制肿瘤生长并提高肿瘤免疫原性。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A humanized, Fc optimized, monoclonal antibody directed against the protein ligand PD-L1 (programmed cell death-1 ligand 1), with potential immune checkpoint inhibitory and antineoplastic activities. Atezolizumab binds to PD-L1, blocking its binding to and activation of its receptor programmed death 1 (PD-1) expressed on activated T-cells, which may enhance the T-cell-mediated immune response to neoplasms and reverse T-cell inactivation. In addition, by binding to PD-L1, MPDL3280A also prevents binding of this ligand to B7.1 expressed on activated T cells, which further enhances the T-cell-mediated immune response. PD-L1 is overexpressed on many human cancer cell types and on various tumor-infiltrating immune cells. PD-L1 binding to PD-1 on T-cells suppresses the immune system and results in increased immune evasion. PD-1, a transmembrane protein, is a negative regulator of the immune system that limits the expansion and survival of CD8+ T cells. The Fc region of MPDL3280A is modified in such a way that it does not induce either antibody-dependent cytotoxicity (ADCC) or complement-dependent cytotoxicity (CDC).

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 考比替尼是一种丝裂原活化蛋白激酶（MAPK）/胞外信号调节激酶-1（MEK1）和胞外信号调节激酶-2（MEK2）的可逆抑制剂。 MEK蛋白是胞外信号相关激酶（ERK）通路的上游调节因子，可促进细胞增殖。 BRAF V600E和V600K突变导致包括MEK1和MEK2在内的BRAF信号通路的组成性激活。 研究发现，考比替尼在BRAF V600E突变型肿瘤细胞移植小鼠中可移植肿瘤细胞的生长。 考比替尼和维莫非尼（vemurafenib）靶向RAS / RAF / MEK / ERK通路中的两个不同的激酶。 与单独使用任何一种药物相比，体外试验显示考比替尼联用维莫非尼可导致细胞凋亡增加，并在BRAF V600E突变型肿瘤细胞小鼠移植模型中减少肿瘤的生长。在小鼠肿瘤细胞移植模型中，考比替尼还阻止了维莫非尼介导的野生型BRAF肿瘤细胞株的生长。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable small-molecule inhibitor of mitogen-activated protein kinase kinase 1 (MAP2K1 or MEK1), with potential antineoplastic activity. Cobimetinib specifically binds to and inhibits the catalytic activity of MEK1, resulting in inhibition of extracellular signal-related kinase 2 (ERK2) phosphorylation and activation and decreased tumor cell proliferation. Preclinical studies have demonstrated that this agent is effective in inhibiting the growth of tumor cells bearing a B-RAF mutation, which has been found to be associated with many tumor types. A threonine-tyrosine kinase and a key component of the RAS/RAF/MEK/ERK signaling pathway that is frequently activated in human tumors, MEK1 is required for the transmission of growth-promoting signals from numerous receptor tyrosine kinases.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: Vemurafenib是一种低分子量的口服BRAF丝氨酸苏氨酸激酶突变抑制剂，包括BRAF V600E。Vemurafenib在体外也抑制其他激酶，如CRAF、ARAF、野生型BRAF、SRMS、ACK1、MAP4K5和FGR等。包括V600E在内的BRAF基因突变导致组成性激活的BRAF蛋白，在缺乏增殖所需的生长因子的情况下可导致细胞增殖。Vemurafenib在BRAF V600E突变的黑素瘤细胞和动物模型中具有抗肿瘤作用。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable, ATP-competitive, small-molecule inhibitor of BRAF(V600E) kinase with potential antineoplastic activity. Vemurafenib selectively binds to the ATP-binding site of BRAF(V600E) kinase and inhibits its activity, which may result in an inhibition of an over-activated MAPK signaling pathway downstream in BRAF(V600E) kinase-expressing tumor cells and a reduction in tumor cell proliferation. Approximately 90% of BRAF gene mutations involve a valine-to-glutamic acid mutation at residue 600 (V600E); the oncogene protein product, BRAF(V600E) kinase, exhibits a markedly elevated activity that over-activates the MAPK signaling pathway. The BRAF(V600E) gene mutation has been found to occur in approximately 60% of melanomas, and in about 8% of all solid tumors, including melanoma, colorectal, thyroid and other cancers.

therapeutic_regimen.regimen_cn: 阿替利珠单抗+考比替尼+维莫非尼

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准奥拉帕利用于携带有害或疑似有害BRCA胚系变异（gBRCAm）的前线经3线及以上化疗的晚期卵巢癌成人患者的治疗。
FDA批准奥拉帕利用于携带BRCA胚系突变（gBRCAm）的HER2阴性的转移性乳腺癌成人患者，这些患者既往接受过新辅助、辅助或转移性治疗中接受过化疗；HR阳性的乳腺癌患者应接受过内分泌治疗或被认为不适合进行内分泌治疗。
FDA批准奥拉帕利用于携带胚系或体细胞 BRCA 突变、一线基于铂类化疗完全缓解或部分缓解的晚期上皮性卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌成人患者的维持治疗。
FDA批准奥拉帕利用于携带有害或疑似有害BRCA胚系突变的（gBRCAm）、接受一线铂类化疗至少16周无进展的转移性胰腺癌成人患者的治疗。
FDA批准奥拉帕利用于携带有害或疑似有害的HRR基因胚系或体细胞突变的（ATMm、BRCA1m、BRCA2m、BARD1m、BRIP1m、CDK12m、CHEK1m、CHEK2m、FANCLm、PALB2m、RAD51Bm、 RAD51Cm、RAD51Dm、RAD54Lm）、前线经恩杂鲁胺或阿比特龙治疗的转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌成人患者（mCRPC）的治疗。
NMPA批准奥拉帕利适用于携带胚系或体细胞BRCA突变的（gBRCAm或sBRCAm）晚期上皮性卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌初治成人患者在一线含铂化疗达到完全缓解或部分缓解后的维持治疗。
FDA批准奥拉帕利适用于携带有害或疑似有害胚系变异（gBRCAm）的、HER2阴性、高风险早期乳腺癌成人患者的辅助治疗，这些患者既往接受过新辅助或辅助化疗。
NMPA批准奥拉帕利用于铂敏感的复发性上皮性卵巢癌或输卵管癌、原发性腹膜癌成人患者在含铂化疗达到完全缓解或部分缓解后的维持治疗。
FDA批准奥拉帕利用于携带胚系或体细胞 BRCA 突变、基于铂类化疗完全缓解或部分缓解的晚期上皮性卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌成人患者的维持治疗。
NMPA附条件批准奥拉帕利单药用于携带胚系或体细胞BRCA突变（gBRCAm或sBRCAm）且既往治疗（包括一种新型内分泌药物）失败的转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌成人患者的治疗。
adaptation_disease_en: FDA approved Olaparib for the treatment of adult patients with deleterious or suspected deleterious germline BRCA-mutated (gBRCAm) advanced ovarian cancer who have been treated with three or more prior lines of chemotherapy.

FDA approved Olaparib for the treatment of adult patients with deleterious or suspected deleterious gBRCAm, HER2-negative metastatic breast cancer who have 
been treated with chemotherapy in the neoadjuvant, adjuvant or metastatic setting. Patients with hormone receptor (HR)-positive breast cancer should have been treated with a prior endocrine therapy or be considered inappropriate for endocrine therapy.

FDA approved Olaparib for the maintenance treatment of adult patients with deleterious or suspected deleterious germline or somatic BRCA-mutated advanced epithelial ovarian, fallopian tube or primary peritoneal cancer who are in complete or partial response to first-line platinum-based chemotherapy.

FDA approved Olaparib for the maintenance treatment of adult patients with deleterious or suspected deleterious gBRCAm metastatic pancreatic adenocarcinoma whose disease has not progressed on at least 16 weeks of a first-line platinum-based chemotherapy regimen.

FDA approved Olaparib for the treatment of adult patients with deleterious or suspected deleterious germline or somatic homologous recombination repair (HRR) gene-mutated metastatic castration-resistant prostate cancer (mCRPC) who have progressed following prior treatment with enzalutamide or abiraterone.

FDA approved Olaparib for the adjuvant treatment of adult patients with deleterious or suspected deleterious gBRCAm human epidermal growth factor receptor 2 (HER2)-negative high risk early breast cancer who have been treated with neoadjuvant or adjuvant chemotherapy.

FDA approved Olaparib for the maintenance treatment of adult patients with deleterious or suspected deleterious germline or somatic BRCA-mutated recurrent epithelial ovarian, fallopian tube or primary peritoneal cancer, who are in complete or partial response to platinum-based chemotherapy.
approval_tumour: 卵巢/输卵管癌;Ovarian/Fallopian Tube Cancer

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: Olaparib（Lynparza）是聚（ADP-核糖）聚合酶（PARP）酶的抑制剂，包括PARP1，PARP2和PARP3。 PARP酶参与正常的细胞功能，例如DNA转录和DNA修复。 已经证明Olaparib在体外抑制人类肿瘤小鼠异种移植模型中特定肿瘤细胞系的生长，无论是单一疗法还是铂类化学疗法。 在细胞株和小鼠肿瘤模型中发现，用olaparib治疗后细胞毒性和抗肿瘤活性增加，而BRCA和非BRCA蛋白的缺陷与DNA损伤的同源重组修复（HRR）有关，并与铂反应相关。 体外研究表明，Olaparib诱导的细胞毒性可能涉及抑制PARP酶活性和增加PARP-DNA复合物的形成，从而导致细胞稳态的破坏和细胞死亡。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A small molecule inhibitor of the nuclear enzyme poly(ADP-ribose) polymerase (PARP) with potential chemosensitizing, radiosensitizing, and antineoplastic activities. Olaparib selectively binds to and inhibits PARP, inhibiting PARP-mediated repair of single strand DNA breaks; PARP inhibition may enhance the cytotoxicity of DNA-damaging agents and may reverse tumor cell chemoresistance and radioresistance. PARP catalyzes post-translational ADP-ribosylation of nuclear proteins and can be activated by single-stranded DNA breaks.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准纳武利尤单抗±伊匹木单抗用于经过氟尿嘧啶、奥沙利铂和伊立替康治疗后进展的MSI-H/dMMR转移性结直肠癌患者的治疗。
NMPA批准纳武利尤单抗（Nivolumab）联合伊匹木单抗（Ipilimumab）用于治疗初治的不可切除的非上皮样恶性胸膜间皮瘤成人患者的治疗。

FDA批准纳武利尤单抗+伊匹木单抗用于不可切除的恶性腹膜间皮瘤成人患者的一线治疗。
FDA批准纳武利尤单抗+伊匹木单抗用于中等或较差风险的晚期肾细胞癌患者的一线治疗。
FDA批准纳武利尤单抗+伊匹木单抗用于前线接受过索拉菲尼治疗的肝细胞癌患者。
FDA批准纳武利尤单抗+伊匹木单抗用于不可切除的晚期或转移性食管鳞状细胞癌患者的一线治疗。
FDA批准纳武利尤单抗+伊匹木单抗用于PD-L1表达阳性（≥1%）且无EGFR或ALK基因变异的转移性非小细胞肺癌成人患者的一线治疗。
FDA批准纳武利尤单抗单药或与伊匹木单抗联用用于不可切除的或转移性黑色素瘤患者。

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: PD-1配体PD-L1和PD-L2与T细胞上的PD-1受体的结合会抑制T细胞增殖和细胞因子的产生。 PD-1配体的上调发生在某些肿瘤中，通过该途径的信号传导可能有助于抑制肿瘤的主动T细胞免疫监视。 Nivolumab是一种人类免疫球蛋白G4（IgG4）单克隆抗体，与PD-1受体结合并阻断其与PD-L1和PD-L2的相互作用，从而释放PD-1途径介导的免疫应答抑制作用，包括抗肿瘤作用免疫反应。在同系小鼠肿瘤模型中，阻断PD-1活性导致肿瘤生长减少。结合的nivolumab（抗PD-1）和ipilimumab（抗CTLA-4）介导的抑制作用导致增强的T细胞功能，其作用大于单独使用任一抗体的作用，并提高了转移性黑素瘤和高级RCC的抗肿瘤反应。在鼠类同系肿瘤模型中，PD-1和CTLA-4的双重阻断导致抗肿瘤活性增加。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A fully human immunoglobulin (Ig) G4 monoclonal antibody directed against the negative immunoregulatory human cell surface receptor programmed death-1 (PD-1, PCD-1) with immune checkpoint inhibitory and antineoplastic activities. Upon administration, nivolumab binds to and blocks the activation of PD-1, an immunoglobulin superfamily (IgSF) transmembrane protein, by its ligands programmed cell death ligand 1 (PD-L1), which is overexpressed on certain cancer cells, and programmed cell death ligand 2 (PD-L2), which is primarily expressed on antigen-presenting cells (APCs). This results in the activation of T-cells and cell-mediated immune responses against tumor cells. Activated PD-1 negatively regulates T-cell activation and plays a key role in tumor evasion from host immunity.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: CTLA-4是T细胞活性的负调节剂。 伊匹木单抗是一种单克隆抗体，可与CTLA-4结合并阻断CTLA-4与其配体CD80 / CD86的相互作用。 已显示对CTLA-4的阻断可增强T细胞的活化和增殖，包括肿瘤浸润性T效应细胞的活化和增殖。 抑制CTLA-4信号传导还可以降低T调节细胞功能，这可能有助于T细胞反应性的普遍提高，包括抗肿瘤免疫反应。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A recombinant human immunoglobulin (Ig) G1 monoclonal antibody directed against the human T-cell receptor cytotoxic T-lymphocyte-associated antigen 4 (CTLA4), with immune checkpoint inhibitory and antineoplastic activities. Ipilimumab binds to CTLA4 expressed on T-cells and inhibits the CTLA4-mediated downregulation of T-cell activation. This leads to a cytotoxic T-lymphocyte (CTL)-mediated immune response against cancer cells. CTLA4, an inhibitory receptor and member of the immunoglobulin superfamily, plays a key role in the downregulation of the immune system.

therapeutic_regimen.regimen_cn: 纳武利尤单抗+伊匹木单抗

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准鲁卡帕尼用于携带BRCA胚系或体系有害突变的、接受过雄激素受体的治疗及基于紫杉醇的方案化疗的转移性去势抵抗前列腺癌（mCRPC）成人患者的治疗。
FDA批准鲁卡帕尼用于对铂类化疗完全或部分反应的复发性上皮性卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌成年患者的维持治疗。
FDA批准鲁卡帕尼用于携带有害BRCA突变（胚系和/或体细胞）、对铂类化疗完全或部分缓解的复发性上皮性卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌成年患者的维持治疗。
adaptation_disease_en: FDA approved Rucaparib for the treatment of adult patients with a deleterious BRCA mutation (germline and/or somatic)-associated metastatic castration-resistant prostate cancer (mCRPC) who have been treated with androgen receptor-directed therapy and a taxane-based chemotherapy.

FDA approved RUBRACA for the maintenance treatment of adult patients with a deleterious BRCA mutation (germline and/or somatic)- associated recurrent epithelial ovarian, fallopian tube, or primary peritoneal cancer who are in a complete or partial response to platinum-based chemotherapy.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: Rucaparib是一种多聚(adp -核糖)聚合酶(PARP)的抑制剂，包括PARP-1, PARP-2和PARP-3，在DNA修复中发挥作用。体外研究表明，rucaparib诱导的细胞毒性可能会抑制PARP酶活性和促进PARP-DNA复合物的形成，从而导致DNA损伤、细胞凋亡和癌细胞死亡。在BRCA1/2和其他DNA修复基因缺失的肿瘤细胞系中观察到rucaparib诱导的细胞毒性和抗肿瘤活性增加。Rucaparib已被证明在人类癌症的小鼠异种移植模型中降低肿瘤生长，无论是否存在BRCA缺失。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable tricyclic indole and inhibitor of poly(ADP-ribose) polymerases (PARPs) 1 (PARP1), 2 (PARP2) and 3 (PARP3), with potential chemo/radiosensitizing and antineoplastic activities. Upon administration, rucaparib selectively binds to PARP1, 2 and 3 and inhibits PARP-mediated DNA repair. This enhances the accumulation of DNA strand breaks, promotes genomic instability and induces cell cycle arrest and apoptosis. This may enhance the cytotoxicity of DNA-damaging agents and reverse tumor cell resistance to chemotherapy and radiation therapy. PARPs are enzymes activated by single-strand DNA breaks that catalyze the post-translational ADP-ribosylation of nuclear proteins, which induces signaling and the recruitment of other proteins to repair damaged DNA. The PARP-mediated repair pathway plays a key role in DNA repair and is dysregulated in a variety of cancer cell types.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准尼拉帕利用于经3线及以上化疗的、HRD阳性（携带BRCA基因的致病或疑似致病性突变或基因组存在不稳定性并在对最后一次铂类化疗反应后6个月以上出现疾病进展）的晚期卵巢癌、输卵管癌及原发性腹膜癌成人患者的治疗。
FDA批准尼拉帕利用于经含铂化疗后达到完全缓解或部分缓解的复发性上皮性卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌成人患者的维持治疗。
FDA批准尼拉帕利用于一线含铂化疗后达到完全缓解或部分缓解的晚期上皮性卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌成人患者的维持治疗。

NMPA批准尼拉帕利用于晚期上皮性卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌成人患者对一线含铂化疗达到完全缓解或部分缓解后的维持治疗。
NMPA批准尼拉帕利用于铂敏感的复发性上皮性卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌成人患者在含铂化疗达到完全缓解或部分缓解后的维持治疗。
FDA批准尼拉帕利用于经含铂化疗后达到完全缓解或部分缓解的、携带有害或疑似有害胚系BRCA突变的复发性上皮性卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌的成年患者的维持治疗。
adaptation_disease_en:
FDA approved Niraparib for the treatment of adult patients with advanced ovarian, fallopian tube or primary peritoneal cancer who have been treated with 3 or more prior chemotherapy regimens and whose cancer is associated with homologous recombination deficiency (HRD) positive status defined by either:
1）a deleterious or suspected deleterious BRCA mutation, or
2）genomic instability and who have progressed more than 6 months after response to the last platinum-based chemotherapy.

FDA approved Niraparib for the maintenance treatment of adult patients with recurrent epithelial 
ovarian, fallopian tube, or primary peritoneal cancer who are in a complete or partial response to 
platinum-based chemotherapy.

FDA approved Niraparib for the maintenance treatment of adult patients with advanced epithelial ovarian, fallopian tube, or primary peritoneal cancer who are in a complete or partial response to first-line platinum-based chemotherapy.
approval_tumour: 卵巢/输卵管癌;Ovarian/Fallopian Tube Cancer

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: Niraparib（尼拉帕利）是聚（ADP-核糖）聚合酶（PARP）酶PARP-1和PARP-2的抑制剂，它们在DNA修复中起作用。 体外研究表明，Niraparib诱导的细胞毒性可能涉及抑制PARP酶活性和增加PARP-DNA复合物的形成，从而导致DNA损伤，细胞凋亡和细胞死亡。 在具有或不具有BRCA1 / 2缺陷的肿瘤细胞系中观察到了Niraparib诱导的细胞毒性增加。 在具有BRCA1 / 2缺陷的人类癌细胞系的小鼠异种移植模型中，以及在具有突变或野生型BRCA1 / 2的同源重组缺陷的人类患者源性异种移植肿瘤模型中，Niraparib降低了肿瘤的生长。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable inhibitor of poly (ADP-ribose) polymerase (PARP) types 1 and 2 (PARP-1 and -2), with antineoplastic activity. Upon administration, niraparib binds to and inhibits the activity of PARP-1 and -2, thereby inhibiting PARP-1 and -2-mediated DNA repair, enhancing the accumulation of DNA strand breaks, promoting genomic instability and resulting in apoptosis. The PARP family of proteins catalyzes post-translational ADP-ribosylation of nuclear proteins and is activated by single-strand DNA (ssDNA) breaks.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准康奈非尼联合西妥昔单抗，用于BRAF V600E突变的成人转移性结直肠癌（CRC）患者的治疗。

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 康奈非尼是一种激酶抑制剂，在体外无细胞试验中可靶向BRAF V600E以及野生型BRAF和CRAF，IC50值分别为0.35、0.47和0.3nM。BRAF基因中的突变(例如BRAF V600E)可导致组成性激活BRAF激酶，从而刺激肿瘤细胞生长。康奈非尼还能够在体外与其他激酶（包括JNK1、JNK2、JNK3、LIMK1、LIMK2、MEK4和STK36）结合，并在临床可达浓度（≤0.9µM）下减少配体与这些激酶的结合。康奈非尼可在体外抑制BRAF V600E、V600D和V600K突变型肿瘤细胞株的生长。在BRAF V600E突变型肿瘤细胞异种移植小鼠模型中，康奈非尼可诱导与RAF/MEK/ERK通路抑制相关的肿瘤消退。康奈非尼和比美替尼（Binimetinib）靶向RAS/RAF/MEK/ERK通路中的两种不同激酶。与单独使用两种药物相比，康奈非尼联用比美替尼在体外对BRAF突变阳性细胞系具有更强的抗增殖活性，并且在小鼠的BRAF V600E突变型人源黑素瘤异种移植模型中表现出更强的抗肿瘤活性。另外，与单独使用任一药物相比，康奈非尼与比美替尼的联用延迟了BRAF V600E突变型人源黑素瘤异种移植小鼠中耐药性的出现。目前已确定，BRAF突变型结直肠癌中EGFR介导的MAPK途径的诱导激活是其对BRAF抑制剂产生耐药性的机制。 在非临床模型中，BRAF抑制剂和EGFR靶向药物的联用组合已被证明可以克服这种耐药机制。 在携带BRAF V600E突变的结直肠癌小鼠模型中，康奈非尼和西妥昔单抗联用被证实具有比单独使用任何一种药物都要强的抗肿瘤作用。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally available Raf kinase inhibitor with potential antineoplastic activity. Encorafenib specifically inhibits Raf kinase, a serine/threonine enzyme in the RAF/mitogen-activated protein kinase kinase (MEK)/extracellular signal-related kinase (ERK) signaling pathway. By inhibiting the activation of the RAF/MEK/ERK signaling pathway, the administration of LGX818 may result in a decrease in proliferation of tumor cells. The Raf mutation BRAF V600E is frequently upregulated in a variety of human tumors and results in the constitutive activation of the RAF/MEK/ERK signaling pathway that regulates cellular proliferation and survival.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 表皮生长因子受体（EGFR，HER1，c-ErbB-1）是跨膜糖蛋白，是I型受体酪氨酸激酶（包括EGFR，HER2，HER3和HER4）亚族成员之一。 EGFR在包括皮肤和毛囊在内的许多正常上皮组织中组成性表达。EGFR的表达在多种人类癌症（包括头颈部癌、结肠和直肠癌）中同样被检出。西妥昔单抗与正常和肿瘤细胞上的EGFR特异性结合，并竞争性抑制表皮生长因子（EGF）和其他配体（如转化生长因子-α）的结合。体外试验和体内动物研究表明，西妥昔单抗与EGFR的结合可阻断受体相关激酶的磷酸化和激活，从而抑制细胞生长，诱导细胞凋亡，并降低基质金属蛋白酶和血管内皮生长因子的产生。EGFR信号转导可导致野生型Ras蛋白的激活，但是在具有激活性Ras体细胞突变的细胞中，突变Ras蛋白都表现出持续的活性，不受EGFR调控状态的影响。在体外，西妥昔单抗可调节针对部分类型人类肿瘤的抗体依赖性细胞毒性（ADCC）。体外试验和体内动物研究表明，西妥昔单抗可抑制EGFR表达肿瘤细胞的生长和存活。在缺乏EGFR表达的人源肿瘤异种移植体中未观察到西妥昔单抗的抗肿瘤作用。在人源肿瘤异种移植小鼠模型中，西妥昔单抗加放疗或西妥昔单抗加伊立替康的抗肿瘤效果强于单独的放疗或化疗。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A recombinant, chimeric monoclonal antibody directed against the epidermal growth factor (EGFR) with antineoplastic activity. Cetuximab binds to the extracellular domain of the EGFR, thereby preventing the activation and subsequent dimerization of the receptor; the decrease in receptor activation and dimerization may result in an inhibition in signal transduction and anti-proliferative effects. This agent may inhibit EGFR-dependent primary tumor growth and metastasis. EGFR is overexpressed on the cell surfaces of various solid tumors.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准奈拉替尼单药用于治疗早期HER2阳性的乳腺癌患者经辅助曲妥珠单抗治疗后的扩展辅助治疗方案。
NMPA批准奈拉替尼用于既往接受过曲妥珠单抗辅助治疗的HER2阳性早期乳腺癌患者的强化辅助治疗。

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: Neratinib是一种细胞内激酶抑制剂，可与表皮生长因子受体（EGFR），HER2和HER4不可逆地结合。 在体外，neratinib降低EGFR和HER2的自磷酸化，下游MAPK和AKT信号通路，并在表达EGFR和/或HER2的癌细胞系中显示抗肿瘤活性。 Neratinib人类代谢产物M3，M6，M7和M11在体外抑制EGFR，HER2和HER4的活性。 在体内，在表达HER2和EGFR的肿瘤细胞系的小鼠异种移植模型中，口服neratinib抑制肿瘤生长。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally available, 6,7-disubstituted-4-anilinoquinoline-3-carbonitrile irreversible inhibitor of the HER-2 receptor tyrosine kinase with potential antineoplastic activity. Neratinib binds to the HER-2 receptor irreversibly, thereby reducing autophosphorylation in cells, apparently by targeting a cysteine residue in the ATP-binding pocket of the receptor. Treatment of cells with this agent results in inhibition of downstream signal transduction events and cell cycle regulatory pathways; arrest at the G1-S (Gap 1/DNA synthesis)-phase transition of the cell division cycle; and ultimately decreased cellular proliferation. Neratinib also inhibits the epidermal growth factor receptor (EGFR) kinase and the proliferation of EGFR-dependent cells.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准卡马替尼用于携带可导致MET 14外显子跳跃的突变的成人转移性非小细胞肺癌患者的治疗。
approval_tumour: 非小细胞肺癌;Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 卡马替尼是一种靶向MET突变（包括由MET14号外显子跳跃突变）的激酶抑制剂。MET14号外显子跳跃突变会导致蛋白质调节域缺失，从而降低负调控，并增加下游MET信号。卡马替尼在临床可达浓度下可抑制由MET14号外显子缺失突变驱动的肿瘤细胞，并且在携MET14号外显子跳跃突变或MET扩增突变的人源肺癌异种移植小鼠模型中显示了抗肿瘤活性。卡马替尼可抑制由肝细胞生长因子结合或MET扩增引起的MET磷酸化、MET介导的下游信号蛋白磷酸化和MET依赖性癌细胞的增殖和存活。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable inhibitor of the proto-oncogene c-Met (also known as hepatocyte growth factor receptor (HGFR)) with potential antineoplastic activity. Capmatinib selectively binds to c-Met, thereby inhibiting c-Met phosphorylation and disrupting c-Met signal transduction pathways. This may induce cell death in tumor cells overexpressing c-Met protein or expressing constitutively activated c-Met protein. c-Met, a receptor tyrosine kinase overexpressed or mutated in many tumor cell types, plays key roles in tumor cell proliferation, survival, invasion, metastasis, and tumor angiogenesis.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准阿培利司+氟维司群用于治疗内分泌治疗进行中或之后发现的HR阳性/HER2阴性的PIK3CA突变的绝经后妇女或男性的晚期或转移性乳腺癌。

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn:
Alpelisib是磷脂酰肌醇3-激酶（PI3K）的抑制剂，主要具有针对PI3Kα的抑制活性。在体外和体内模型中，编码PI3K的催化性α-亚基（PIK3CA）的基因中的功能获得性突变导致PI3Kα的激活和Akt信号转导，细胞转化以及肿瘤的产生。
在乳腺癌细胞系中，alpelisib抑制PI3K下游靶标（包括Akt）的磷酸化，并在具有PIK3CA突变的细胞系中显示活性。在体内，alpelisib在异种移植模型（包括乳腺癌模型）中抑制PI3K / Akt信号传导途径并减少肿瘤生长。
通过alpelisib治疗抑制PI3K已显示可诱导乳腺癌细胞中雌激素受体（ER）转录增加。与单独的两种治疗方法相比，alpelisib和fulvestrant的组合具有增强的抗肿瘤活性，而这两种方法均来自ER阳性，PIK3CA突变的乳腺癌细胞系。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable phosphatidylinositol 3-kinase (PI3K) inhibitor with potential antineoplastic activity. Alpelisib specifically inhibits PI3K in the PI3K/AKT kinase (or protein kinase B) signaling pathway, thereby inhibiting the activation of the PI3K signaling pathway. This may result in inhibition of tumor cell growth and survival in susceptible tumor cell populations. Activation of the PI3K signaling pathway is frequently associated with tumorigenesis. Dysregulated PI3K signaling may contribute to tumor resistance to a variety of antineoplastic agents.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 氟维司群是一种合成的雌激素受体拮抗剂。 与他莫昔芬（具有部分激动剂作用）和芳香化酶抑制剂（减少肿瘤细胞可用的雌激素）不同，氟维司群与乳腺癌细胞中的雌激素受体竞争性地结合，导致雌激素受体形变、雌激素结合减少。体外研究表明，氟维司群可逆地抑制他莫昔芬耐药的雌激素敏感的人类乳腺癌细胞系的生长。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A synthetic estrogen receptor antagonist.  Unlike tamoxifen (which has partial agonist effects) and the aromatase inhibitors (which reduce the estrogen available to tumor cells), fulvestrant binds competitively to estrogen receptors in breast cancer cells, resulting in estrogen receptor deformation and decreased estrogen binding. In vitro studies indicate that fulvestrant reversibly inhibits the growth of tamoxifen-resistant, estrogen-sensitive, human breast cancer cell lines. (NCI04)

adaptation_disease_cn: NMPA批准替雷利珠单抗注射液用于治疗不可切除或转移性微卫星高度不稳定型（MSI-H）或错配修复基因缺陷型（dMMR）的成人晚期实体瘤患者，包括既往经过氟尿嘧啶类、奥沙利铂和伊立替康治疗后出现疾病进展的晚期结直肠癌患者以及既往治疗后出现疾病进展且无满意替代治疗方案的其他晚期实体瘤患者。
NMPA批准替雷利珠单抗用于局部晚期或转移性非小细胞肺癌（NSCLC）患者的二线或三线治疗。
NMPA批准替雷利珠单抗注射液用于经含铂化疗失败包括新辅助或辅助化疗12个月内进展的局部晚期或转移性PD-L1高表达的尿路上皮癌（UC）患者的治疗。
NMPA批准替雷利珠单抗用于治疗既往接受过一线标准化疗后进展或不可耐受的局部晚期或转移性食管鳞状细胞癌（ESCC）患者。
NMPA批准替雷利珠单抗用于治疗既往接受过治疗的肝细胞癌(HCC)患者。
NMPA批准替雷利珠单抗用于至少经过二线系统化疗的复发或难治性经典型霍奇金淋巴瘤的治疗。

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 替雷利珠单抗为人源化重组抗PD-1单克隆抗体。T细胞表达的PD-1受体与其配体PD-L1和PD-L2结合，可以抑制T细胞增殖和细胞因子生成。部分肿瘤细胞的PD-1配体上调，通过这个通路信号传导可抑制激活的T细胞对肿瘤细胞的免疫监视。替雷利珠单抗与人重组PD-1结合的EC50为0.12nM，抑制PD-1与PD-1结合的IC50约为0.5nM，抑制PD-1与PDL2结合的IC50约为0.4~0.6nM.
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A monoclonal antibody directed against the negative immunoregulatory human cell surface receptor programmed cell death 1 (PD-1), with potential immune checkpoint inhibitory and antineoplastic activities. Upon administration, tislelizumab binds to PD-1 and inhibits the binding of PD-1 to the PD-1 ligands programmed cell death-1 ligand 1 (PD-L1), and PD-1 ligand 2 (PD-L2). This prevents the activation of PD-1 and its downstream signaling pathways. This may restore immune function through the activation of both T-cells and T-cell-mediated immune responses against tumor cells. PD-1, a transmembrane protein in the immunoglobulin (Ig) superfamily expressed on activated T-cells, negatively regulates T-cell activation and effector function when activated by its ligands; it plays an important role in tumor evasion from host immunity.

adaptation_disease_cn: NMPA批准恩沃利单抗用于不可切除或转移性微卫星高度不稳定（MSI-H）或错配修复基因缺陷型（dMMR）的成人晚期实体瘤患者的治疗，包括既往经过氟尿嘧啶类、奥沙利铂和伊立替康治疗后出现疾病进展的晚期结直肠癌患者以及既往治疗后出现疾病进展且无满意替代治疗方案的其他晚期实体瘤患者。

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 恩沃利单抗注射液为重组人源化PD-L1单域抗体Fc融合蛋白注射液，可结合人PD-L1 蛋白，并阻断其与受体PD-1的相互作用，解除肿瘤通过PD-1/PD-L1途径对T细胞的抑制作用，调动免疫系统的抗肿瘤活性杀伤肿瘤。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: Envafolimab(KN035) is a single domain antibody to PD-L1, created by a fusion of the of PD-L1 domain antibody with the Fc domain of a regular antibody.

adaptation_disease_cn: NMPA批准恩沙替尼用于此前接受过克唑替尼治疗后进展或对克唑替尼不耐受的ALK阳性、局部晚期或转移性NSCLC患者的治疗。
approval_tumour: 非小细胞肺癌;Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 恩沙替尼是一种酪氨酸激酶间变性淋巴瘤激酶（ALK）小分子抑制剂，具有潜在的抗肿瘤活性。恩沙替尼结合并抑制ALK从而使ALK介导的信号传导中断，最终抑制ALK表达肿瘤细胞的肿瘤细胞生长。体外细胞学研究中，相比一代ALK抑制剂克唑替尼，在抑制ALK阳性肺癌细胞系的生长能力方面，恩沙替尼是克唑替尼的10倍。对于导致克唑替尼耐药的L1196M和C1156Y突变，恩沙替尼也表现出较强的抑制活性。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally available small molecule inhibitor of the receptor tyrosine kinase anaplastic lymphoma kinase (ALK) with potential antineoplastic activity. Upon oral administration, ensartinib binds to and inhibits ALK kinase, ALK fusion proteins and ALK point mutation variants. Inhibition of ALK leads to the disruption of ALK-mediated signaling and eventually inhibits tumor cell growth in ALK-expressing tumor cells. ALK belongs to the insulin receptor superfamily and plays an important role in nervous system development. ALK is not expressed in healthy adult human tissue but ALK dysregulation and gene rearrangements are associated with a series of tumors; ALK mutations are associated with acquired resistance to small molecule tyrosine kinase inhibitors.

adaptation_disease_cn: NMPA批准赛沃替尼（Savolitinib）用于含铂化疗后疾病进展或不耐受标准含铂化疗的、具有间质-上皮转化因子（MET）外显子14跳变的局部晚期或转移性非小细胞肺癌成人患者。
approval_tumour: 非小细胞肺癌;Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: Savolitinib 是一种具有潜在抗肿瘤活性的 c-Met 受体酪氨酸激酶的口服生物可利用抑制剂。 Savolitinib 以 ATP 竞争性方式选择性结合并抑制 c-Met 的激活，并破坏 c-Met 信号转导途径。 这可能会导致过度表达 c-Met 蛋白的肿瘤中的细胞生长受到抑制。 C-Met 编码肝细胞生长因子受体酪氨酸激酶，在肿瘤细胞增殖、存活、侵袭和转移以及肿瘤血管生成中起重要作用； 这种蛋白质在多种癌症中过度表达或突变。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable inhibitor of the c-Met receptor tyrosine kinase with potential antineoplastic activity. Savolitinib selectively binds to and inhibits the activation of c-Met in an ATP-competitive manner, and disrupts c-Met signal transduction pathways. This may result in cell growth inhibition in tumors that overexpress the c-Met protein. C-Met encodes the hepatocyte growth factor receptor tyrosine kinase and plays an important role in tumor cell proliferation, survival, invasion, and metastasis, and tumor angiogenesis; this protein is overexpressed or mutated in a variety of cancers.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准阿来替尼用于ALK阳性的转移性非小细胞肺癌患者的治疗。
NMPA批准阿来替尼用于ALK阳性的局部晚期或转移性非小细胞肺癌患者的治疗。
approval_tumour: 非小细胞肺癌;Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn:
Alectinib是靶向ALK和RET的酪氨酸激酶抑制剂。 在非临床研究中，Alectinib抑制ALK磷酸化和ALK介导的下游信号蛋白STAT3和AKT的活化，并降低携带ALK融合，扩增或激活突变的多种细胞系中肿瘤细胞的活力。 Alectinib的主要活性代谢产物M4表现出相似的体外效价和活性。
Alectinib和M4表现出针对多种ALK酶突变形式的体外和体内活性，包括在克唑替尼进展的NSCLC肿瘤患者中发现的一些突变。在植入了携带ALK融合蛋白的肿瘤的小鼠模型中，施用Alectinib可产生抗肿瘤活性并延长生存期，包括在植入ALK驱动的肿瘤细胞系的小鼠模型中。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally available inhibitor of the receptor tyrosine kinase anaplastic lymphoma kinase (ALK) with antineoplastic activity. Upon administration, alectinib binds to and inhibits ALK kinase, ALK fusion proteins as well as the gatekeeper mutation ALKL1196M known as one of the mechanisms of acquired resistance to small-molecule kinase inhibitors. The inhibition leads to disruption of ALK-mediated signaling and eventually inhibits tumor cell growth in ALK-overexpressing tumor cells. ALK belongs to the insulin receptor superfamily and plays an important role in nervous system development. ALK dysregulation and gene rearrangements are associated with a series of tumors.

adaptation_disease_cn: NMPA批准布格替尼用于治疗ALK阳性的转移性非小细胞肺癌（NSCLC）患者的治疗。
FDA批准布格替尼用于治疗ALK阳性的转移性非小细胞肺癌（NSCLC）患者的治疗。
approval_tumour: 非小细胞肺癌;Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 布格替尼是一种酪氨酸激酶抑制剂，在临床可达浓度下具有抗多种激酶（包括ALK、ROS1、胰岛素样生长因子-1受体（IGF-1R）、FLT-3）以及EGFR缺失和点突变的体外活性。体外和体内实验显示，布格替尼可抑制ALK的自磷酸化与ALK介导的下游信号蛋白STAT3、AKT、ERK1/2和S6的磷酸化。布格替尼还可抑制EML4-ALK和NPM-ALK融合蛋白表达细胞系的体外增殖，并且剂量依赖性抑制EML4-ALK阳性非小细胞肺癌（NSCLC）异种移植小鼠的生长。在临床可达浓度（≤500 nM）下，布格替尼可体外抑制表达EML4-ALK、17种与ALK抑制剂（包括crizotinib）耐药性相关突变或EGFR  Del（E746-A750）、ROS1-L2026M、FLT3-F691L、FLT3-D835Y突变型细胞的活性。布格替尼针对4种EML4-ALK突变型表现出体内抗肿瘤活性，包括在使用crizotinib后疾病进展的NSCLC肿瘤中发现的G1202R和L1196M突变型。布格替尼还可减轻ALK驱动肿瘤细胞颅内移植小鼠的肿瘤负担，并延长的存活时间。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally available inhibitor of receptor tyrosine kinases anaplastic lymphoma kinase (ALK) and the epidermal growth factor receptor (EGFR) with potential antineoplastic activity. Brigatinib binds to and inhibits ALK kinase and ALK fusion proteins as well as EGFR and mutant forms. This leads to the inhibition of ALK kinase and EGFR kinase, disrupts their signaling pathways and eventually inhibits tumor cell growth in susceptible tumor cells. In addition, AP26113 appears to overcome mutation-based resistance. ALK belongs to the insulin receptor superfamily and plays an important role in nervous system development; ALK dysregulation and gene rearrangements are associated with a series of tumors. EGFR is overexpressed in a variety of cancer cell types.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准塞瑞替尼用于克唑替尼治疗后进展或不耐受的ALK阳性转移性非小细胞肺癌患者的治疗。
NMPA批准塞瑞替尼用于ALK阳性的成人转移性非小细胞肺癌患者的治疗。
FDA批准塞瑞替尼用于ALK阳性的成人转移性非小细胞肺癌患者的治疗。
approval_tumour: 非小细胞肺癌;Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 塞瑞替尼是一种激酶抑制剂。生化、细胞试验显示塞瑞替尼在临床相关浓度下可抑制的靶点包括ALK、胰岛素样生长因子-1受体（IGF-1R）、胰岛素受体（InsR）和ROS1。其中，塞瑞替尼对ALK的抑制最为有效。体外和体内试验显示塞瑞替尼可抑制ALK的自磷酸化、ALK介导下游信号蛋白STAT3的磷酸化和ALK依赖性癌细胞的增殖。塞瑞替尼可抑制表达EML4-ALK和NPM-ALK融合蛋白的细胞株的体外增殖，并剂量依赖性抑制小鼠和大鼠EML4-ALK阳性非小细胞肺癌（NSCLC）异种移植瘤的生长。 在克唑替尼耐药的EML4-ALK阳性NSCLC异种移植小鼠模型中，赛瑞替尼在临床相关范围内的浓度下呈现出剂量依赖性的抗肿瘤活性。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally available inhibitor of the receptor tyrosine kinase activity of anaplastic lymphoma kinase (ALK) with antineoplastic activity. Upon administration, ceritinib binds to and inhibits wild-type ALK kinase, ALK fusion proteins and ALK point mutation variants. Inhibition of ALK leads to both the disruption of ALK-mediated signaling and the inhibition of cell growth in ALK-overexpressing tumor cells. ALK belongs to the insulin receptor superfamily and plays an important role in nervous system development. ALK dysregulation and gene rearrangements are associated with a variety of tumor cell types.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准达拉非尼单药用于治疗具有BRAF V600E突变的不可切除或转移性黑色素瘤患者。

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 达拉非尼是部分突变型BRAF激酶的抑制剂，其对BRAF V600E、BRAF V600K和BRAF V600D突变型激酶的体外IC50值分别为0.65、0.5和1.84 nM。达拉非尼还抑制野生型BRAF和CRAF激酶，IC50值分别为3.2和5.0 nM，并且在更高浓度下可抑制其他激酶（如SIK1，NEK11和LIMK1）。 BRAF基因中的某些突变（包括BRAF V600E突变），可能会导致BRAF激酶组成性激活，从而刺激肿瘤细胞的生长。 达拉非尼在体外和体内均可抑制多种BRAF V600突变阳性肿瘤细胞的生长。达拉非尼联用曲美替尼可靶向RAS / RAF / MEK / ERK通路中的两种激酶。 与单独使用这两种药物相比，达拉非尼联用曲美替尼对BRAF V600突变阳性肿瘤细胞系生长的体外抑制效果更强，并且对BRAF V600突变阳性肿瘤异种移植瘤生长的抑制作用也更持久。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable inhibitor of B-raf (BRAF) protein with potential antineoplastic activity. Dabrafenib selectively binds to and inhibits the activity of B-raf, which may inhibit the proliferation of tumor cells which contain a mutated BRAF gene. B-raf belongs to the raf/mil family of serine/threonine protein kinases and plays a role in regulating the MAP kinase/ERKs signaling pathway, which may be constitutively activated due to BRAF gene mutations.

adaptation_disease_cn: NMPA批准达拉非尼+曲美替尼用于携带BRAF V600E突变的晚期或转移性非小细胞肺癌患者的治疗。
FDA基于该临床试验批准达拉非尼+曲美替尼用于BRAF V600E突变的、无理想的局部治疗选择的局部晚期或转移性未分化甲状腺癌患者的治疗。
FDA批准达拉非尼联合曲美替尼用于BRAF V600E或V600K突变的不可切除的或转移性的黑色素瘤患者的治疗。
FDA批准达拉非尼联合曲美替尼，用于经治进展的、且无满意替代治疗方案的、携带BRAF V600E突变的不可切除或转移性成人和6岁以上儿童实体瘤患者的治疗。由于结直肠癌已知的、内在的对BRAF抑制剂的抗性，因此，该实体瘤获批适应症不包含结直肠癌。
FDA批准曲美替尼联合达拉非尼用于携带BRAF V600E或V600K突变的累及淋巴结的完全性切除术后的黑色素瘤患者的辅助治疗。
NMPA批准曲美替尼联合达拉非尼用于BRAF V600突变阳性的不可切除或转移性黑色素瘤的治疗。
FDA批准达拉非尼+曲美替尼用于携带BRAF V600E突变的晚期或转移性非小细胞肺癌患者的治疗。
NMPA批准曲美替尼联合达拉非尼用于BRAF V600突变阳性的III期黑色素瘤患者完全切除后的辅助治疗。
FDA批准达拉非尼联合曲美替尼用于治疗1岁及以上需要全身治疗的BRAF V600E突变的低级别胶质瘤（LGG）儿童患者。
NMPA附条件批准达拉非尼联合曲美替尼用于治疗BRAF V600突变阳性的转移性非小细胞肺癌患者。
approval_tumour: 非小细胞肺癌;Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer
未分化甲状腺癌;Anaplastic Thyroid Cancer

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 达拉非尼是部分突变型BRAF激酶的抑制剂，其对BRAF V600E、BRAF V600K和BRAF V600D突变型激酶的体外IC50值分别为0.65、0.5和1.84 nM。达拉非尼还抑制野生型BRAF和CRAF激酶，IC50值分别为3.2和5.0 nM，并且在更高浓度下可抑制其他激酶（如SIK1，NEK11和LIMK1）。 BRAF基因中的某些突变（包括BRAF V600E突变），可能会导致BRAF激酶组成性激活，从而刺激肿瘤细胞的生长。 达拉非尼在体外和体内均可抑制多种BRAF V600突变阳性肿瘤细胞的生长。达拉非尼联用曲美替尼可靶向RAS / RAF / MEK / ERK通路中的两种激酶。 与单独使用这两种药物相比，达拉非尼联用曲美替尼对BRAF V600突变阳性肿瘤细胞系生长的体外抑制效果更强，并且对BRAF V600突变阳性肿瘤异种移植瘤生长的抑制作用也更持久。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable inhibitor of B-raf (BRAF) protein with potential antineoplastic activity. Dabrafenib selectively binds to and inhibits the activity of B-raf, which may inhibit the proliferation of tumor cells which contain a mutated BRAF gene. B-raf belongs to the raf/mil family of serine/threonine protein kinases and plays a role in regulating the MAP kinase/ERKs signaling pathway, which may be constitutively activated due to BRAF gene mutations.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: Trametinib是有丝分裂原激活的胞外信号调节激酶1 (MEK1)和MEK2的激活以及MEK1和MEK2激酶活性的可逆抑制剂。MEK蛋白是细胞外信号相关激酶(ERK)通路的上游调节因子，可促进细胞增殖。BRAF V600E突变导致包括MEK1和MEK2在内的BRAF通路的结构性激活。Trametinib在体内外抑制多种BRAF V600突变阳性肿瘤细胞生长。Trametinib和dabrafenib针对RAS/RAF/MEK/ERK通路中的两种不同的激酶。与单独使用任一药物相比，联合使用trametinib和dabrafenib在体外对BRAF V600突变阳性肿瘤细胞系的生长抑制更强，并延长了对BRAF V600突变阳性肿瘤异种移植瘤生长的抑制时间。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable inhibitor of mitogen-activated protein kinase kinase (MEK MAPK/ERK kinase) with potential antineoplastic activity. Trametinib specifically binds to and inhibits MEK 1 and 2, resulting in an inhibition of growth factor-mediated cell signaling and cellular proliferation in various cancers. MEK 1 and 2, dual specificity threonine/tyrosine kinases often upregulated in various cancer cell types, play a key role in the activation of the RAS/RAF/MEK/ERK signaling pathway that regulates cell growth.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准洛拉替尼用于以下几种治疗方案治疗后进展的ALK阳性的转移性非小细胞肺癌患者：1）克唑替尼及至少1种其他ALK抑制剂治疗；2）阿来替尼作为一线治疗；3）塞瑞替尼作为一线治疗。
FDA批准洛拉替尼用于ALK阳性的转移性非小细胞肺癌成年患者的治疗。
NMPA批准洛拉替尼单药用于间变性淋巴瘤激酶（ALK）阳性的局部晚期或转移性非小细胞肺癌患者的治疗。
approval_tumour: 非小细胞肺癌;Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: Lorlatinib（洛拉替尼）是一种激酶抑制剂，对ALK和ROS1以及TYK1，FER，FPS，TRKA，TRKB，TRKC，FAK，FAK2和ACK具有体外活性。 洛拉替尼在体外表现出针对多种突变形式的ALK酶的活性，包括在克唑替尼和其他ALK抑制剂疾病进展时在肿瘤中检测到的某些突变。 在皮下植入了带有ALK变体1或ALK突变的EML4融合蛋白的肿瘤的小鼠，其中包括在疾病进展时在ALK抑制剂上在肿瘤中检测到的G1202R和I1171T突变，施用洛拉替尼会产生抗肿瘤活性。 洛拉替尼还显示出在颅内植入EML4-ALK驱动的肿瘤细胞系的小鼠中的抗肿瘤活性和延长的生存期。 洛拉替尼在体内模型中的总体抗肿瘤活性是剂量依赖性的，并且与ALK磷酸化的抑制作用有关。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally available, ATP-competitive inhibitor of the receptor tyrosine kinases, anaplastic lymphoma kinase (ALK) and C-ros oncogene 1 (Ros1), with potential antineoplastic activity. Upon administration, lorlatinib binds to and inhibits both ALK and ROS1 kinases. The kinase inhibition leads to disruption of ALK- and ROS1-mediated signaling and eventually inhibits tumor cell growth in ALK- and ROS1-overexpressing tumor cells. In addition, PF-06463922 is able to cross the blood brain barrier. ALK belongs to the insulin receptor superfamily and plays an important role in nervous system development; ALK dysregulation and gene rearrangements are associated with a series of tumors. ROS1, overexpressed in certain cancer cells, plays a key role in cell growth and survival of cancer cells.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准纳武利尤单抗±伊匹木单抗用于经过氟尿嘧啶、奥沙利铂和伊立替康治疗后进展的MSI-H/dMMR转移性结直肠癌患者的治疗。

NMPA批准纳武利尤单抗治疗EGFR阴性和ALK阴性的既往接受过含铂方案化疗方案后疾病进展或不可耐受的局部晚期或转移性非小细胞肺癌成年患者。
NMPA批准纳武利尤单抗用于既往接受过2种或2种以上全身治疗方案的晚期或复发性胃或胃食管交接处腺癌患者的治疗。
NMPA批准纳武利尤单抗用于治疗接受含铂类方案治疗期间或之后出现疾病进展且肿瘤 PD-L1 表达阳性（PD-L1 ≥1%）的复发性或转移性头颈部鳞状细胞癌 (SCCHN)患者的治疗。

FDA批准纳武利尤单抗作为完全切除的黑色素瘤伴淋巴结转移或转移性疾病患者的辅助治疗。
FDA批准纳武利尤单抗用于前线接受过抗血管治疗的晚期肾细胞癌患者。
FDA批准纳武利尤单抗用于以下治疗方案治疗复发或进展后的经典霍奇金淋巴瘤成人患者：1）自体造血干细胞移植（HSCT）及brentuximab vedotin；2）三线及以上的系统性治疗，其中包括HSCT。
FDA批准纳武利尤单抗用于铂类治疗中或治疗后发生疾病进展的复发性或转移性头颈鳞状细胞癌患者。
FDA批准纳武利尤单抗用于放射切除后复发风险为高危的尿路上皮癌患者的辅助治疗。
FDA批准纳武利尤单抗用于具有以下2种情况的局部晚期或转移性尿路上皮癌（UC）患者：1）铂类化疗期间或治疗后发生疾病进展；2）使用铂类化疗作为新辅助或辅助治疗的12个月内发生疾病进展。
FDA批准纳武利尤单抗用于接受过新辅助放化疗（CRT）的完全切除但仍有残留病理疾病的食管或胃食管连接部癌患者。
FDA批准纳武利尤单抗用于前线接受过基于氟尿嘧啶和铂类的化疗的不可切除的晚期、复发或转移性的食管鳞癌患者。
FDA批准纳武利尤单抗用于铂类化疗治疗期间或之后发生疾病进展的转移性非小细胞肺癌患者。其中，EGFR或ALK基因变异的患者应在靶向相应的基因变异的治疗发生疾病进展之后才能使用。
NMPA批准纳武利尤单抗用于接受根治性切除术后伴有高复发风险的尿路上皮癌患者的辅助治疗。
FDA批准纳武利尤单抗单药或与伊匹木单抗联用用于不可切除的或转移性黑色素瘤患者。

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: PD-1配体PD-L1和PD-L2与T细胞上的PD-1受体的结合会抑制T细胞增殖和细胞因子的产生。 PD-1配体的上调发生在某些肿瘤中，通过该途径的信号传导可能有助于抑制肿瘤的主动T细胞免疫监视。 Nivolumab是一种人类免疫球蛋白G4（IgG4）单克隆抗体，与PD-1受体结合并阻断其与PD-L1和PD-L2的相互作用，从而释放PD-1途径介导的免疫应答抑制作用，包括抗肿瘤作用免疫反应。在同系小鼠肿瘤模型中，阻断PD-1活性导致肿瘤生长减少。结合的nivolumab（抗PD-1）和ipilimumab（抗CTLA-4）介导的抑制作用导致增强的T细胞功能，其作用大于单独使用任一抗体的作用，并提高了转移性黑素瘤和高级RCC的抗肿瘤反应。在鼠类同系肿瘤模型中，PD-1和CTLA-4的双重阻断导致抗肿瘤活性增加。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A fully human immunoglobulin (Ig) G4 monoclonal antibody directed against the negative immunoregulatory human cell surface receptor programmed death-1 (PD-1, PCD-1) with immune checkpoint inhibitory and antineoplastic activities. Upon administration, nivolumab binds to and blocks the activation of PD-1, an immunoglobulin superfamily (IgSF) transmembrane protein, by its ligands programmed cell death ligand 1 (PD-L1), which is overexpressed on certain cancer cells, and programmed cell death ligand 2 (PD-L2), which is primarily expressed on antigen-presenting cells (APCs). This results in the activation of T-cells and cell-mediated immune responses against tumor cells. Activated PD-1 negatively regulates T-cell activation and plays a key role in tumor evasion from host immunity.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准贝伐珠单抗用于治疗复发性胶质母细胞瘤成人患者。
NMPA批准贝伐珠单抗用于成人复发性胶质母细胞瘤患者的治疗。
approval_tumour: 非小细胞肺癌;Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 贝伐珠单抗结合VEGF并阻止VEGF与其在内皮细胞表面的受体（Flt-1和KDR）相互作用。 在血管生成的体外模型中，VEGF与其受体的相互作用导致内皮细胞增殖和新血管形成。 在裸鼠结肠癌异种移植模型中应用贝伐珠单抗可降低微血管生长和抑制转移性疾病的进展。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A recombinant humanized monoclonal antibody directed against the vascular endothelial growth factor (VEGF), a pro-angiogenic cytokine.  Bevacizumab binds to VEGF and inhibits VEGF receptor binding, thereby preventing the growth and maintenance of tumor blood vessels.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA已批准帕博利珠单抗（pembrolizumab）单药用于不可切除或转移性的高肿瘤突变负荷(TMB-H)[≥10mut/Mb]的成人和儿童实体瘤，这些患者经既往治疗后进展，且没有令人满意的替代治疗方案。
FDA批准帕博利珠单抗用于MSI-H/dMMR的不可切除或转移性结直肠患者的治疗。
FDA批准帕博利珠单抗用于不可切除或转移性的MSI-H/dMMR的前线治疗后进展且没有令人满意的替代治疗方案的实体瘤患者。
NMPA批准帕博利珠单抗用于一线治疗进展后的局部晚期或转移性黑色素瘤。
NMPA批准帕博利珠单抗用于PD-L1 CPS≥10、既往一线全身治疗失败的、局部晚期或转移性食管鳞状细胞癌(ESCC)患者的治疗。
NMPA批准帕博利珠单抗用于肿瘤表达 PD-L1 CPS≥20的转移性或不可切除的复发性头颈部鳞状细胞癌（HNSCC）患者的一线单药治疗。
NMPA批准帕博利珠单抗用于KRAS、NRAS和BRAF基因均为野生型的，转移性或不可切除高微卫星不稳定性或错配修复基因缺陷型（MSI-H/dMMR）结直肠癌患者的一线治疗。
NMPA批准帕博利珠单抗用于由国家药品监督管理局批准的检测评估为PD-L1肿痛比例分数(TPS)≥1%的表皮生长因子受体(EGFR)基因突变阴性和间变性淋巴瘤激酶(ALK)阴性的局部晚期或转移性非小细胞肺癌一线单药治疗。

FDA批准帕博利珠单抗用于：1.不能切除或转移性黑色素瘤的患者的治疗；2.完全切除的IIB、IIC或III期的成人或儿童（12岁及以上）黑色素瘤患者的辅助治疗。
FDA批准帕博利珠单抗单药用于含铂化疗时或之后病情进展的复发性或转移性的头颈鳞状细胞癌（HNSCC）患者。
FDA批准帕博利珠单抗可用于：1、单药治疗复发性或难治性经典型霍奇金淋巴瘤（cHL）成人患者；2、难治性cHL，或经二线及二线以上治疗后复发的霍奇金淋巴瘤（cHL）儿童患者。
FDA批准帕博利珠单抗可用于经过2线及以上治疗后复发的难治性原发性纵隔大B细胞淋巴瘤（PMBCL）成人和儿童患者的治疗。
FDA批准帕博利珠单抗用于具有以下情形的局部晚期或转移性尿路上皮癌患者：1.不适合含顺铂的化疗；2.在含铂化疗期间或之后，或在含铂化疗的新辅助或辅助治疗后12个月内病情进展。
FDA批准帕博利珠单抗用于不适合或已选择不接受膀胱切除术，对卡介苗（BCG）治疗无反应、高风险、无肌肉浸润性膀胱癌（NMIBC）患者。
FDA批准帕博利珠单抗用于前线接受过索拉非尼治疗的肝细胞癌（HCC）患者。
FDA批准帕博利珠单抗用于复发的局部晚期或转移性默克尔细胞癌成人或儿童患者。
FDA批准帕博利珠单抗用于肾切除术后或肾及转移灶切除术后复发风险为中高危或高危的肾细胞癌患者的辅助治疗。
FDA批准帕博利珠单抗用于不能通过手术或放疗治愈的复发或转移性皮肤鳞状细胞癌（cSCC）患者的治疗。

FDA批准帕博利珠单抗单药用于包含以下情况的PD-L1表达阳性（TPS≥1%）且EGFR或ALK无变异的NSCLC患者的一线治疗：1）不适合手术切除或放化疗的III期疾病；2）转移性。
FDA批准帕博利珠单抗单药用于PD-L1表达阳性（TPS≥1%）的铂类化疗期间或之后发生疾病进展的转移性NSCLC患者；其中携带EGFR或ALK基因变异的患者应在靶向其相应基因变异的治疗发生进展后再使用帕博利珠单抗。
FDA批准帕博利珠单抗单药用于PD-L1表达阳性（CPS≥1）的转移性或无法手术的复发性的头颈部鳞状细胞癌患者的一线治疗。
FDA批准帕博利珠单抗用于无法手术或放化疗的局部晚期或转移性食管癌或胃食管交界癌（肿瘤中心位于胃食管交界处上方1至5厘米）患者，包括：1）与基于铂类和氟尿嘧啶的化疗联用；2）单药用于PD-L1表达阳性（CPS≥10）的接受过一线及以上系统性治疗的鳞状细胞癌患者。

FDA批准帕博利珠单抗+化疗用于高危早期三阴性乳腺癌患者的新辅助治疗，术后单药作为辅助治疗。
FDA批准帕博利珠单抗+化疗用于PD-L1表达阳性（CPS≥10）的不可切除的或转移性的三阴性乳腺癌患者。
FDA批准帕博利珠单抗单药用于治疗MSI-H或dMMR的晚期子宫内膜癌患者，这些患者经既往任何系统治疗后疾病进展，且不适合进行治疗性手术或放疗。
FDA批准帕博利珠单抗单药用于PD-L1表达阳性（CPS≥1）的化疗治疗期间或之后发生疾病进展的复发或转移性宫颈癌患者。
FDA批准帕博利珠单抗用于完全切除并经铂类化疗后的IB期（T2a≥4 cm）、II期或IIIA期非小细胞肺癌（NSCLC）患者的辅助治疗。

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: PD-1配体PD-L1和PD-L2与T细胞上的PD-1受体的结合可抑制T细胞增殖和细胞因子的产生。 PD-1配体的上调发生在某些肿瘤中，通过该途径的信号传导可能有助于抑制肿瘤的主动T细胞免疫监视。 Pembrolizumab是与PD-1受体结合并阻断其与PD-L1和PD-L2相互作用的单克隆抗体，可释放PD-1途径介导的免疫应答抑制作用，包括抗肿瘤免疫应答。 在同系小鼠肿瘤模型中，阻断PD-1活性导致肿瘤生长减少。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A humanized monoclonal immunoglobulin (Ig) G4 antibody directed against human cell surface receptor PD-1 (programmed death-1 or programmed cell death-1) with potential immune checkpoint inhibitory and antineoplastic activities. Upon administration, pembrolizumab binds to PD-1, an inhibitory signaling receptor expressed on the surface of activated T cells, and blocks the binding to and activation of PD-1 by its ligands, which results in the activation of T-cell-mediated immune responses against tumor cells. The ligands for PD-1 include programmed cell death ligand 1 (PD-L1), overexpressed on certain cancer cells, and programmed cell death ligand 2 (PD-L2), which is primarily expressed on APCs. Activated PD-1 negatively regulates T-cell activation and plays a key role in in tumor evasion from host immunity.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准曲美替尼单药用于治疗具有BRAF V600E或V600K突变的不可切除或转移性黑色素瘤患者。

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: Trametinib是有丝分裂原激活的胞外信号调节激酶1 (MEK1)和MEK2的激活以及MEK1和MEK2激酶活性的可逆抑制剂。MEK蛋白是细胞外信号相关激酶(ERK)通路的上游调节因子，可促进细胞增殖。BRAF V600E突变导致包括MEK1和MEK2在内的BRAF通路的结构性激活。Trametinib在体内外抑制多种BRAF V600突变阳性肿瘤细胞生长。Trametinib和dabrafenib针对RAS/RAF/MEK/ERK通路中的两种不同的激酶。与单独使用任一药物相比，联合使用trametinib和dabrafenib在体外对BRAF V600突变阳性肿瘤细胞系的生长抑制更强，并延长了对BRAF V600突变阳性肿瘤异种移植瘤生长的抑制时间。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable inhibitor of mitogen-activated protein kinase kinase (MEK MAPK/ERK kinase) with potential antineoplastic activity. Trametinib specifically binds to and inhibits MEK 1 and 2, resulting in an inhibition of growth factor-mediated cell signaling and cellular proliferation in various cancers. MEK 1 and 2, dual specificity threonine/tyrosine kinases often upregulated in various cancer cell types, play a key role in the activation of the RAS/RAF/MEK/ERK signaling pathway that regulates cell growth.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准维莫非尼用于携带BRAF V600E突变的不可切除或转移性黑色素瘤患者的治疗。
NMPA批准维莫非尼用于经NMPA批准的检测方法确定的BRAF V600突变阳性不可切除或转移性黑色素瘤的治疗。
FDA批准维莫非尼用于具有BRAF V600突变的Erdheim-Chester疾病（ECD）患者的治疗。

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: Vemurafenib是一种低分子量的口服BRAF丝氨酸苏氨酸激酶突变抑制剂，包括BRAF V600E。Vemurafenib在体外也抑制其他激酶，如CRAF、ARAF、野生型BRAF、SRMS、ACK1、MAP4K5和FGR等。包括V600E在内的BRAF基因突变导致组成性激活的BRAF蛋白，在缺乏增殖所需的生长因子的情况下可导致细胞增殖。Vemurafenib在BRAF V600E突变的黑素瘤细胞和动物模型中具有抗肿瘤作用。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable, ATP-competitive, small-molecule inhibitor of BRAF(V600E) kinase with potential antineoplastic activity. Vemurafenib selectively binds to the ATP-binding site of BRAF(V600E) kinase and inhibits its activity, which may result in an inhibition of an over-activated MAPK signaling pathway downstream in BRAF(V600E) kinase-expressing tumor cells and a reduction in tumor cell proliferation. Approximately 90% of BRAF gene mutations involve a valine-to-glutamic acid mutation at residue 600 (V600E); the oncogene protein product, BRAF(V600E) kinase, exhibits a markedly elevated activity that over-activates the MAPK signaling pathway. The BRAF(V600E) gene mutation has been found to occur in approximately 60% of melanomas, and in about 8% of all solid tumors, including melanoma, colorectal, thyroid and other cancers.

adaptation_disease_cn: NMPA批准斯鲁利单抗用于不可切除或转移性微卫星高度不稳定（MSI-H）的成人晚期实体瘤患者：1.既往经过氟尿嘧啶类、奥沙利铂和伊立替康治疗后出现疾病进展的晚期结直肠癌患者；2.既往至少二线治疗后出现疾病进展且无满意替代治疗方案的晚期胃癌患者；3.既往至少一线治疗后出现疾病进展且无满意替代治疗方案的其他晚期实体瘤患者。

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 通过 DNA 重组技术由中国仓鼠卵巢细胞制得的重组抗程序性死亡受体 1 人源化单克隆抗体。

adaptation_disease_cn: NMPA批准普特利单抗适用于不可切除或转移性的高度微卫星不稳定型（MSI-H）或错配修复缺陷型（dMMR）的晚期实体瘤患者：1. 既往经过氟尿嘧啶类、奥沙利铂和伊立替康治疗后出现疾病进展的晚期结直肠癌患者；2. 既往至少一线治疗后出现疾病进展且无满意替代治疗方案的其他晚期实体瘤患者。
NMPA批准普特利单抗用于既往接受全身系统治疗失败的不可切除或转移性黑色素瘤患者的治疗。

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 普特利单抗（pucotenlimab）是通过使用人IgG4亚型针对人PD-1的人源化单抗。它可以拮抗PD-1信号，通过阻断PD-1与其配体PD-L1及PD-L2的结合来恢复免疫细胞杀死癌细胞的能力。同时，普特利单抗采用抗体工程技术，于Fc区引入突变，提高FcRn的结合亲和力，从而大幅延长其半衰期，提高患者的临床疗效及药物依从性。

drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A semisynthetic derivative of camptothecin, a cytotoxic, quinoline-based alkaloid extracted from the Asian tree Camptotheca acuminata.  Irinotecan, a prodrug, is converted to a biologically active metabolite 7-ethyl-10-hydroxy-camptothecin (SN-38) by a carboxylesterase-converting enzyme.  One thousand-fold more potent than its parent compound irinotecan, SN-38 inhibits topoisomerase I activity by stabilizing the cleavable complex between topoisomerase I and DNA, resulting in DNA breaks that inhibit DNA replication and trigger apoptotic cell death.  Because ongoing DNA synthesis is necessary for irinotecan to exert its cytotoxic effects, it is classified as an S-phase-specific agent.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 表皮生长因子受体（EGFR，HER1，c-ErbB-1）是跨膜糖蛋白，是I型受体酪氨酸激酶（包括EGFR，HER2，HER3和HER4）亚族成员之一。 EGFR在包括皮肤和毛囊在内的许多正常上皮组织中组成性表达。EGFR的表达在多种人类癌症（包括头颈部癌、结肠和直肠癌）中同样被检出。西妥昔单抗与正常和肿瘤细胞上的EGFR特异性结合，并竞争性抑制表皮生长因子（EGF）和其他配体（如转化生长因子-α）的结合。体外试验和体内动物研究表明，西妥昔单抗与EGFR的结合可阻断受体相关激酶的磷酸化和激活，从而抑制细胞生长，诱导细胞凋亡，并降低基质金属蛋白酶和血管内皮生长因子的产生。EGFR信号转导可导致野生型Ras蛋白的激活，但是在具有激活性Ras体细胞突变的细胞中，突变Ras蛋白都表现出持续的活性，不受EGFR调控状态的影响。在体外，西妥昔单抗可调节针对部分类型人类肿瘤的抗体依赖性细胞毒性（ADCC）。体外试验和体内动物研究表明，西妥昔单抗可抑制EGFR表达肿瘤细胞的生长和存活。在缺乏EGFR表达的人源肿瘤异种移植体中未观察到西妥昔单抗的抗肿瘤作用。在人源肿瘤异种移植小鼠模型中，西妥昔单抗加放疗或西妥昔单抗加伊立替康的抗肿瘤效果强于单独的放疗或化疗。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A recombinant, chimeric monoclonal antibody directed against the epidermal growth factor (EGFR) with antineoplastic activity. Cetuximab binds to the extracellular domain of the EGFR, thereby preventing the activation and subsequent dimerization of the receptor; the decrease in receptor activation and dimerization may result in an inhibition in signal transduction and anti-proliferative effects. This agent may inhibit EGFR-dependent primary tumor growth and metastasis. EGFR is overexpressed on the cell surfaces of various solid tumors.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: Vemurafenib是一种低分子量的口服BRAF丝氨酸苏氨酸激酶突变抑制剂，包括BRAF V600E。Vemurafenib在体外也抑制其他激酶，如CRAF、ARAF、野生型BRAF、SRMS、ACK1、MAP4K5和FGR等。包括V600E在内的BRAF基因突变导致组成性激活的BRAF蛋白，在缺乏增殖所需的生长因子的情况下可导致细胞增殖。Vemurafenib在BRAF V600E突变的黑素瘤细胞和动物模型中具有抗肿瘤作用。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable, ATP-competitive, small-molecule inhibitor of BRAF(V600E) kinase with potential antineoplastic activity. Vemurafenib selectively binds to the ATP-binding site of BRAF(V600E) kinase and inhibits its activity, which may result in an inhibition of an over-activated MAPK signaling pathway downstream in BRAF(V600E) kinase-expressing tumor cells and a reduction in tumor cell proliferation. Approximately 90% of BRAF gene mutations involve a valine-to-glutamic acid mutation at residue 600 (V600E); the oncogene protein product, BRAF(V600E) kinase, exhibits a markedly elevated activity that over-activates the MAPK signaling pathway. The BRAF(V600E) gene mutation has been found to occur in approximately 60% of melanomas, and in about 8% of all solid tumors, including melanoma, colorectal, thyroid and other cancers.

therapeutic_regimen.regimen_cn: 伊立替康+西妥昔单抗+维莫非尼

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准贝伐珠单抗联合阿替利珠单抗用于疗既往未接受全身治疗的不可切除或转移性HCC患者。
NMPA批准贝伐珠单抗联合阿替利珠单抗治疗既往未接受过全身系统性治疗的不可切除肝细胞癌患者。

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 贝伐珠单抗结合VEGF并阻止VEGF与其在内皮细胞表面的受体（Flt-1和KDR）相互作用。 在血管生成的体外模型中，VEGF与其受体的相互作用导致内皮细胞增殖和新血管形成。 在裸鼠结肠癌异种移植模型中应用贝伐珠单抗可降低微血管生长和抑制转移性疾病的进展。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A recombinant humanized monoclonal antibody directed against the vascular endothelial growth factor (VEGF), a pro-angiogenic cytokine.  Bevacizumab binds to VEGF and inhibits VEGF receptor binding, thereby preventing the growth and maintenance of tumor blood vessels.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn:
PD-L1可以在肿瘤细胞和/或肿瘤浸润性免疫细胞上表达，并且可以在肿瘤微环境中有助于抑制抗肿瘤免疫反应。PD-L1与T细胞和抗原呈递细胞上的PD-1和B7.1受体结合，抑制细胞毒性T细胞活性、T细胞增殖和细胞因子的产生。
Atezolizumab是与PD-L1结合并阻断其与PD-1和B7.1受体相互作用的单克隆抗体。这释放了PD-L1 / PD-1介导的免疫反应抑制作用，包括抗肿瘤免疫反应的激活，而不会引起抗体依赖性细胞毒性。在同系小鼠肿瘤模型中，阻断PD-L1活性可导致肿瘤生长减少。
在癌症的小鼠模型中，与单独的靶向治疗相比，PD-1 / PD-L1和MAPK途径的双重抑制可通过增加抗原呈递，T细胞浸润和激活来抑制肿瘤生长并提高肿瘤免疫原性。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A humanized, Fc optimized, monoclonal antibody directed against the protein ligand PD-L1 (programmed cell death-1 ligand 1), with potential immune checkpoint inhibitory and antineoplastic activities. Atezolizumab binds to PD-L1, blocking its binding to and activation of its receptor programmed death 1 (PD-1) expressed on activated T-cells, which may enhance the T-cell-mediated immune response to neoplasms and reverse T-cell inactivation. In addition, by binding to PD-L1, MPDL3280A also prevents binding of this ligand to B7.1 expressed on activated T cells, which further enhances the T-cell-mediated immune response. PD-L1 is overexpressed on many human cancer cell types and on various tumor-infiltrating immune cells. PD-L1 binding to PD-1 on T-cells suppresses the immune system and results in increased immune evasion. PD-1, a transmembrane protein, is a negative regulator of the immune system that limits the expansion and survival of CD8+ T cells. The Fc region of MPDL3280A is modified in such a way that it does not induce either antibody-dependent cytotoxicity (ADCC) or complement-dependent cytotoxicity (CDC).

therapeutic_regimen.regimen_cn: 贝伐珠单抗+阿替利珠单抗

drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A small molecule inhibitor of the tyrosine kinase WEE1 with potential antineoplastic sensitizing activity. Adavosertib selectively targets and inhibits WEE1, a tyrosine kinase that phosphorylates cyclin-dependent kinase 1 (CDK1, CDC2) to inactivate the CDC2/cyclin B complex. Inhibition of WEE1 activity prevents the phosphorylation of CDC2 and impairs the G2 DNA damage checkpoint. This may lead to apoptosis upon treatment with DNA damaging chemotherapeutic agents. Unlike normal cells, most p53 deficient or mutated human cancers lack the G1 checkpoint as p53 is the key regulator of the G1 checkpoint and these cells rely on the G2 checkpoint for DNA repair to damaged cells. Annulment of the G2 checkpoint may therefore make p53 deficient tumor cells more vulnerable to antineoplastic agents and enhance their cytotoxic effect.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 卡铂的主要作用是将烷基连接到核苷酸上，导致单加合物的形成，以及当修复酶试图纠正错误时 DNA 片段化。 2% 的卡铂活性来自 DNA 从一条链上的碱基到另一条上碱基的交联，从而防止 DNA 链分离以进行合成或转录。卡铂可以诱导许多不同的突变。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: Carboplatin is an organoplatinum antineoplastic alkylating agent used in the treatment of advanced ovarian carcinoma.Early clinical studies of carboplatin were performed in 1982. Carboplatin was developed as an analog of cisplatin with reduced nephrotoxicity and vomiting.Carboplatin was granted FDA approval on 3 March 1989.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 紫杉醇是一种抗微管类的化疗药物。 紫杉醇常用于多种癌症治疗中，它是一种有丝分裂抑制剂，是于 1971 年从太平洋紫杉树的树皮中首次分离出来，并于1993年批准用于医学用途，并被列于世界卫生组织的基本药物清单。 紫杉醇的作用机理主要是去影响微管的正常功能，透过稳定与GDP结合的微管蛋白，从而致使快速分裂的肿瘤细胞在有丝分裂阶段被限制而无法分离，将细胞阻断于细胞周期之G2与M期间，使癌细胞复制受阻断而死亡。因此紫杉醇在抗癌药物当中，被视为有丝分裂中的微管抑制剂。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: Paclitaxel is a chemotherapeutic agent marketed under the brand name Taxol among others. Used as a treatment for various cancers, paclitaxel is a mitotic inhibitor that was first isolated in 1971 from the bark of the Pacific yew tree which contains endophytic fungi that synthesize paclitaxel. It is available as an intravenous solution for injection and the newer formulation contains albumin-bound paclitaxel marketed under the brand name Abraxane.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 是一种组蛋白乙酰转移酶抑制剂，可抑制p300。

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准克唑替尼用于ALK阳性的转移性非小细胞肺癌（NSCLC）患者的治疗。
FDA批准克唑替尼用于ROS1阳性的转移性非小细胞肺癌患者。
FDA批准克唑替尼用于治疗ALK阳性的复发/难治性全身性间变性大细胞淋巴瘤(ALCL)1岁以上儿童和成人患者的治疗。
NMPA批准克唑替尼用于ROS1阳性晚期非小细胞肺癌患者的治疗。
NMPA批准克唑替尼用于ALK阳性的局部晚期或转移性非小细胞肺癌（NSCLC）患者的治疗。
FDA批准克唑替尼用于治疗不可切除、复发性或难治性ALK阳性的炎症性肌纤维母细胞瘤成人和大于1岁的儿童患者。
adaptation_disease_en: FDA approved crizotinib for adult and pediatric patients 1 year of age and older with unresectable, recurrent, or refractory inflammatory anaplastic lymphoma kinase (ALK)-positive myofibroblastic tumors (IMT).
approval_tumour: 非小细胞肺癌;Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer
炎症性肌纤维母细胞瘤;Inflammatory Myofibroblastic Tumor
间变性大细胞淋巴瘤;Anaplastic Large Cell Lymphoma

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 克唑替尼是一种受体酪氨酸激酶抑制剂，可抑制包括ALK、肝细胞生长因子受体（HGFR，c-Met）、ROS1（c-ros）和Recepteur d'Origine Nantais（RON）等受体酪氨酸激酶的活性。染色体易位可以影响ALK基因，导致癌基因融合蛋白的表达。ALK融合蛋白的形成导致基因表达和信号的失活和失调，这有助于提高表达这些蛋白的肿瘤细胞的增殖和存活率。克唑替尼在使用肿瘤细胞系的细胞分析中显示出对ALK、ROS1和c-Met磷酸化的浓度依赖性抑制作用，并且在表达EML4-ALK或NPM-ALK融合蛋白或c-Met的肿瘤异种移植小鼠模型中显示出抗肿瘤活性。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally available aminopyridine-based inhibitor of the receptor tyrosine kinase anaplastic lymphoma kinase (ALK) and the c-Met/hepatocyte growth factor receptor (HGFR) with antineoplastic activity. Crizotinib, in an ATP-competitive manner, binds to and inhibits ALK kinase and ALK fusion proteins. In addition, crizotinib inhibits c-Met kinase, and disrupts the c-Met signaling pathway. Altogether, this agent inhibits tumor cell growth. ALK belongs to the insulin receptor superfamily and plays an important role in nervous system development. ALK dysregulation and gene rearrangements are associated with a series of tumors.

adaptation_disease_cn: NMPA批准伊鲁阿克用于既往接受过克唑替尼治疗后疾病进展或对克唑替尼不耐受的间变性淋巴瘤激酶（ALK）阳性的局部晚期或转移性非小细胞肺癌（NSCLC）患者的治疗。
NMPA批准伊鲁阿克用于一线治疗ALK阳性的非小细胞肺癌（NSCLC）患者。

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 伊鲁阿克(Iruplinalkib)是一种口服的小分子受体酪氨酸激酶(RTK)间变性淋巴瘤激酶(ALK)抑制剂，可通过抑制 ALK 和 ROS1 激酶的磷酸化进而阻断 ERK、STAT5 和 AKT 等下游信号通路蛋白的激活，从而诱导肿瘤细胞死亡（凋亡）。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally available, small molecule inhibitor of the receptor tyrosine kinase (RTK) anaplastic lymphoma kinase (ALK), with potential antineoplastic activity. Upon oral administration, WX-0593 binds to and inhibits ALK tyrosine kinase, ALK fusion proteins, ALK point mutation variants ALK L1196M, ALK C1156Y, and EGFR L858R/T790M. Inhibition of ALK leads to the disruption of ALK-mediated signaling and the inhibition of cell growth in ALK-expressing tumor cells. ALK belongs to the insulin receptor superfamily and plays an important role in nervous system development. ALK is not expressed in healthy adult human tissue but ALK dysregulation and gene rearrangements are associated with a series of tumors. Additionally, ALK mutations are associated with acquired resistance to small molecule tyrosine kinase inhibitors.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: Vemurafenib是一种低分子量的口服BRAF丝氨酸苏氨酸激酶突变抑制剂，包括BRAF V600E。Vemurafenib在体外也抑制其他激酶，如CRAF、ARAF、野生型BRAF、SRMS、ACK1、MAP4K5和FGR等。包括V600E在内的BRAF基因突变导致组成性激活的BRAF蛋白，在缺乏增殖所需的生长因子的情况下可导致细胞增殖。Vemurafenib在BRAF V600E突变的黑素瘤细胞和动物模型中具有抗肿瘤作用。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable, ATP-competitive, small-molecule inhibitor of BRAF(V600E) kinase with potential antineoplastic activity. Vemurafenib selectively binds to the ATP-binding site of BRAF(V600E) kinase and inhibits its activity, which may result in an inhibition of an over-activated MAPK signaling pathway downstream in BRAF(V600E) kinase-expressing tumor cells and a reduction in tumor cell proliferation. Approximately 90% of BRAF gene mutations involve a valine-to-glutamic acid mutation at residue 600 (V600E); the oncogene protein product, BRAF(V600E) kinase, exhibits a markedly elevated activity that over-activates the MAPK signaling pathway. The BRAF(V600E) gene mutation has been found to occur in approximately 60% of melanomas, and in about 8% of all solid tumors, including melanoma, colorectal, thyroid and other cancers.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 表皮生长因子受体（EGFR）在正常细胞和癌细胞的细胞表面表达。 在一些肿瘤细胞中，通过该受体的信号传导在肿瘤细胞存活和增殖中均起作用，而与EGFR突变状态无关。 厄洛替尼可逆地抑制EGFR的激酶活性，防止与受体相关的酪氨酸残基的自磷酸化，从而进一步抑制下游信号传导。 EGFR外显子19缺失或外显子21（L858R）突变的厄洛替尼结合亲和力高于其对野生型受体的亲和力。 厄洛替尼对其他酪氨酸激酶受体的抑制作用尚未完全表征。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A quinazoline derivative with antineoplastic properties.  Competing with adenosine triphosphate, erlotinib reversibly binds to the intracellular catalytic domain of epidermal growth factor receptor (EGFR) tyrosine kinase, thereby reversibly inhibiting EGFR phosphorylation and blocking the signal transduction events and tumorigenic effects associated with EGFR activation.

A humanized monoclonal antibody directed against the negative immunoregulatory human cell surface receptor programmed death-1 (PD-1, PCD-1), with immune checkpoint inhibitory and antineoplastic activities. Upon administration, spartalizumab binds to PD-1 expressed on activated T-cells and blocks the interaction with its ligands, programmed cell death 1 ligand 1 (PD-L1, PD-1L1) and PD-1 ligand 2 (PD-L2, PD-1L2). The inhibition of ligand binding prevents PD-1-mediated signaling and results in both T-cell activation and the induction of T-cell-mediated immune responses against tumor cells. PD-1, an immunoglobulin (Ig) superfamily transmembrane protein and inhibitory receptor, negatively regulates T-cell activation.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 达拉非尼是部分突变型BRAF激酶的抑制剂，其对BRAF V600E、BRAF V600K和BRAF V600D突变型激酶的体外IC50值分别为0.65、0.5和1.84 nM。达拉非尼还抑制野生型BRAF和CRAF激酶，IC50值分别为3.2和5.0 nM，并且在更高浓度下可抑制其他激酶（如SIK1，NEK11和LIMK1）。 BRAF基因中的某些突变（包括BRAF V600E突变），可能会导致BRAF激酶组成性激活，从而刺激肿瘤细胞的生长。 达拉非尼在体外和体内均可抑制多种BRAF V600突变阳性肿瘤细胞的生长。达拉非尼联用曲美替尼可靶向RAS / RAF / MEK / ERK通路中的两种激酶。 与单独使用这两种药物相比，达拉非尼联用曲美替尼对BRAF V600突变阳性肿瘤细胞系生长的体外抑制效果更强，并且对BRAF V600突变阳性肿瘤异种移植瘤生长的抑制作用也更持久。
